10.20(1): du rgyud/ ces pa la gnyis te/ rgyud pa 'khrug can dang 'khrug med gnyis so/ /dang

11.1(1): sgong skyes ye gshen gtsug phud nas rgyud pa dang / rdzus skyes gsang ba 'dus pa nas 
11.2(1): rgyud pa'o/ /dang po ni/ drod skyes 'chi med gtsug phud nas/ gshen hor ti chen po 
11.3(1): la brgyud/ khong gis theg dgu mkhyen pa la/ kun mkhyen don grub kyis zhus pa/ rgyu 
11.4(1): mtshan nyid kyi bon 'di/ gzhi spong ba zhig 'dug ste/ de yang tshegs che la don chung 
11.5(1): ba zhig 'dug /sngags bskyed rdzogs kyi bon 'di/ gzhi bsgyur ba zhig 'dug ste/ de

11.7(1): 'di/ gzhi byin gyis rlabs pas/ tshegs chung la don che ba zhig 'dug pas/ 'di 
11.8(1): zhu zhes zhus pas/ hor ti chen po'i zhal nas/ shes par byas nas dor ba'i bon

11.11(1): dgos gsungs/ mtshan nyid shes par byas nas dor zhig /sngags bskyed rdzogs kyi

12.4(1): su/ lo dgu nyams su blangs pas/ thun mong dang mchog gi dngos grub gnyis ka

12.6(1): ra sangs klu rgyal gyis zhus pas/ rgyu 'bras kyi bon rnams ma 'gags par bstan

13.4(1): pas/ thun mong dang mchog gi dngos grub bsnyems pa lags so/ ! bla ma ra sangs 
13.5(1): bsam grub de la/ zhang zhung sad ne ga'us zhus pas/ rgyud kyi bon 'di bdag la

20.11(1): rgyas 'gro don la rnam sprul du byon pa yin pas/ mkhyen brtse'i yon tan dang grub 
20.12(1): pa'i don rtags du ma dang ldan zhing / rdzu 'phrul phyogs bcur 'gyed/ 'khor ba 
20.13(1): rtsad chod khyad par don gyi rig 'dzin yin pas/ mya ngan las 'das dus phung po sa 
20.14(1): la mi 'bor/ rdzu 'phrul stobs kyis 'das so/ ! bzhi pa mkhas pa lo paN gyi brgyud 
20.15(1): pa ni/ hor ti chen po nas don kun grub pa la brgyud de/ bla ma des rtsa bral gyi lta 
20.16(1): ba rtogs/ des ra sangs 'phan rgyal la brgyud de/ bla ma des gsal stong gi sgom 
20.17(1): pa la mnga' bsnyems/ des gu rib gsas dga' la brgyud de/ bla ma de ni ro snyoms 
20.18(1): spyod pa bskyangs/ ! des zla ba rgyal mtshan la brgyud de/ bla ma de ni bon nyid rang 
20.19(1): sa zin/ dbu rgyan gyi bla ma bzhi po de yang / thun mong gi dngos grub chu la mi bying ba 
20.20(1): dang / mkha' la 'phur ba dang / pha bong rtar zhon pa dang / chu bo gyen la bzlog pa 
20.21(1): las sogs la thogs pa med/ mchog gi dngos grub rtog med chen po mngon du gyur 
21.1(1): nas sangs rgyas so//de ni lha bon yongs su dag pa nas brgyud pa'i 'khrug med 
21.2(1): do/ /gdams pa thams cad kyi mtha' ni snang bzher lod po la bzhag go /de ltar 
21.3(1): nyi shu rtsa bzhi ni/ gong mas 'og ma la yi ge ris su ma bstan zhing / tshig gis snyan 
21.4(1): du brgyud de/ de dag gi yon tan bsam gyis mi khyab/ kun brtags kyi sgrib pa'i sa 
21.5(1): bon dang bcas pa byang / shes rab kyis bden pa mngon sum du gzigs/ 'khor 
21.6(1): ba'i sa las 'phags/ g.yung drung theg pa'i sa non/ nam mkha' la bya bzhin 'phur/
21.7(1): chu la nya bzhin 'phyo/ sa rdo ri brag la thogs med du 'dzul/ lo brgya lon nas bcu 
21.8(1): drug lon par phyir la sgyur/ lo stong dang drug brgya nas sems can gyi don du 'chi 
21.9(1): 'pho'i tshul ston pa 'am/ bskal pa mang por bzhugs kyang / shin tu gzhon zhing 
21.10(1): 'chi 'pho med pa dang / longs sku dang sprul sku'i rgyal tshab byed cing de dag gi tshul 
21.11(1): gyis zhing khams dpag tu med par/ sku dang phrin las dpag tu med pas/ sems 
21.12(1): can dpag tu med pa'i don mdzad pa las sogs du mar bshad do/ /
21.13(1): 7 ! gnyis pa nye rgyud thog babs ni/ rnam sprul 'gro don gyi rgyud pa la drug ste/
21.14(1): sprul sku drin can gnyis/ zhang zhung smar gyi grub chen drug /smad lugs kyi bla ma lnga/
21.15(1): stod lugs kyi bla ma drug /byang rgyud kyi bla ma dgu/ lho rgyud kyi bla ma bcu gcig go /
21.16(1): 7 ! dang po bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ dpon chen ta pi ra tsa'i lo rgyus la lnga/ dang 
21.17(1): po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ yab ra sangs klu rgyal/
21.18(1): yum shes rig gsal yin/ de'i sras ta pi ra tsa (zhang skad )yin no/ /bod skad du 
21.19(1): rgyal po'o/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang 
21.20(1): ji ltar mjal na/ yab ra sangs klu rgyal dang / dpon chen ra sangs gnyis la yang 
21.21(1): bon zhus/ khyad par gang zag nyi shu rtsa bzhi'i gzhug /tshe spungs zla ba rgyal mtshan 
22.1(1): la/ bka' rgyud nyams rgyud rdzogs par zhus so/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can 
22.2(1): gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ stag thabs seng ge'i brag la dka' ba spyad 
22.3(1): de/ lo dgu'i mi tshig gis bar ma chad par nyams su blangs/ bzhi pa thun mong dang 
22.4(1): gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ mchog dang thun mong gi dngos grub ma 
22.5(1): lus par bsnyems nas/ phung po lhag med du sangs rgyas so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon 
22.6(1): gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bdag don du bon sku mngon du gyur nas/ gzhan don 
22.7(1): du sprul pa'i sku byis par (zhang skad kyi ta pi ra tsa zer bar sprul/)sprul nas/ rnam mkhyen gyi 
22.8(1): ye shes thob/ sku ma nges pa du mar sprul/ skal ldan gyi rgyud gcig char du grol ba 
22.9(1): lags so/ /yon tan du ma dang ldan no/ /
22.10(1): ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ gyer spungs chen po snang bzher lod po'i lo rgyus la lnga/
22.11(1): dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ gdung rus gu rib 
22.12(1): yin/ yab gu rib 'bum me dang / yum mang 'or za sgron ne bya ba yin/ gnyis pa 
22.13(1): las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ji ltar mjal zhe 
22.14(1): na/ dgung lo bcu gsum lon pa dang bon sgor zhugs/ bzhi bcu zhe bdun pa la 
22.15(1): spros mtha' bcad pa'i dus na/ / tshe spungs zla ba rgyal mtshan la zang zing gi longs 
22.16(1): spyod mang po phul/ ma mig gi nub phyogs brag rong dkar po'i gseb tu ngo sprod 
22.17(1): lnga'i gdams pa btab nas/ gyer spungs chen pos 'di su la yang mi ston lags 
22.18(1): zhus pas/ bla ma'i zhal nas/ snod ldan byung na brgya la yang ston cig gsungs so/ /
22.19(1): gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du bstan pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ yul da 
22.20(1): rog yin/ mtsho sman las sogs mi dang mi min 'du/ sa der dka' ba spyad tshul ni/
22.21(1): lo gcig mtsho gling gi do la dpon slob gnyis kyis/ sku rgyags cha rkyen dang bcas 
23.1(1): nas bzhugs so//gyer spungs kyis gsol gyi gzhug du zan ting re bzhag /de nas 
23.2(1): mtsho rul te/ yang zan ting gi gzhug la 'jam re mdzad nas/ dpon slob gnyis 
23.3(1): pos gsol/ 'jam gyi gzhug gi rtsig ma re/ dbu bsngas kyi brag la pho yin bzhag /
23.4(1): yang mtsho rul/ brag ngos kyi 'jam rtsigs brad nas/ de chu la btab kyin gsol 
23.5(1): nas/ lo gsum song ba dang  / phyag phyi ba'i bsam pas/ nged dpon slob gnyis 
23.6(1): kar ni nam kyang 'grongs ni 'grongs par 'dug dang la kho rang mchongs nas ro 
23.7(1): zhig byed bsam ste/ gyer spungs lags mi yi ro bsam pa zhig gda' ste zhus pas/
23.8(1): khyod de la thug gam gsungs/ thug lags so zhus pas/ 'o na do 'di la bskor la 
23.9(1): ci 'dug ltos gsungs/ khos phyin pas rkyang gcig gi ro zhig gda' zhus pas/ de 
23.10(1): 'u bu gtsang rigs brten pas za mi nyan gsungs/ de nas zhag 'ga' nas phyin 
23.11(1): pas/ bud med lba ba log pa'i ro zhig gda' zhu ba phul bas/ bshul chags kyi sha 
23.12(1): za mi nyan/ cha cho tsho bsdegs gsungs/ gyer spungs ci mdzad pa yin bsam ste/ snga 
23.13(1): gro zhig 'gro sa ni med bsam ste skrag go /gyer spungs la 'jus la mig tshum zhig 
23.14(1): gsungs/ yun ring zhig phyin nas/ khos me lcags lus bsam ste/ mig phye nas phyi 
23.15(1): la bltas pas/ bud med rgyan gos can gcig snam bu dkar po gcig 'gril gyin 
23.16(1): 'ong gin 'dug snga sor bltas pas sngar gyi bud med 'dra ba gcig gis/ snam bu 
23.17(1): dkar po gcig brkyang pa'i steng na/ khong dpon slob 'byon gyin 'dug /khos mig 
23.18(1): bltas ma thag snam bu 'then nas gar song cha med/ chu 'thon kha ru chu la subs 
23.19(1): so/ /de nas byang re khyim pa mang pos mtha' bskor te 'dug nas/ ru khrod na nged 
23.20(1): gyer spungs yin byas pas/ sha yang zad/ spu yang skyes/ ngo mi shes par song pas/
23.21(1): khong pa na re gyer spungs grongs nas lo mang / khyed min zer ro/ /sngar gyis lo rgyus 
24.1(1): rnams bshad pas/ yid ches nas dang la thal chu drangs/ de nas ra dkar 'bri 
24.2(1): dkar gyi 'o ma drangs/ de rjes zhag 'ga' nas/ gsol zas tshad la zhus pas/ sku 
24.3(1): tshad la sos so/ /brten pa'i tshe ni lnga brgya bdun cu rtsa gsum bzhugs so/ /bzhi 
24.4(1): pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ bsam las 'das pa 
24.5(1): mnga' na'ang / spu bya ba gser srang gang la lo gsum sngags na/ bod khams phung /
24.6(1): khyung bya ba srang phyed la zla ba gsum sngags na/ rgyal po 'khor bcas phung / khyung 
24.7(1): za mtsho rgyal gyis zhu nan phul nas/ bstan pa la dgongs nas/ rngub bya ba gser 
24.8(1): zho gang la sngags te zhag bdun sgrubs/ sum cha srod la 'phang / yar lung gi mtsho 
24.9(1): skams klu bros/ sum cha nam phyed la 'phang / yar lung spungs po ri'i sha ba gnyis 
24.10(1): bsad/ lnga ring kyi ri yod/ sum cha tho rang la 'phang pas/ rgyal po khri srong sde btsan 
24.11(1): bsnyung gi zin/ zhabs spyi thog blangs pas dbang du 'dus/ bka' bzhin bsgrubs 
24.12(1): nas/ rdzogs pa chen po zhang zhung snyan rgyud/ ge khod me ri las sogs skor rnams 
24.13(1): dang / rgyal po'i stong tshad la phul rting / rgyal po lig mi rkya'i sku tshab/ bla ri gangs 
24.14(1): ti se'i mgul du/ gser gyi mchod rten lig mi rkya'i sku tshad cig bzhengs pa/ bon 
24.15(1): rnams so so la bzhugs su 'jug pa/ gu rib kyi mi sde la g.yas gral dang khral 
24.16(1): mi bskod pa/ rgyal po khri srong gi khas blangs dam du bcas pas/ da lta yang bon 
24.17(1): zhang zhung snyan rgyud gter du ma nub cing / byin rlabs che ba yang de tsug lags 
24.18(1): so/ /rgyas pa zur na yod/ bon zab mo 'di yi bka' srung zhig btsal dgongs 
24.19(1): nas/ shangs kyi gad pa 'grod shol du/ btso'i sgrub pa mdzad de/ srid pa'i pho rigs 
24.20(1): thams cad dbang du bsdus/ de dus dbang chen gyi rgyal po nyi pang sad kyis srog 
24.21(1): snying phul te/ gyer spungs rnams kyis ma bsgrubs par las byed cing / bstan pa 
25.1(1): srung bar khas blangs/ srid pa'i mo rigs thams cad dbang du bsdus/ sman ku ma 
25.2(1): ra tsas srog snying phul/ ma bsgrubs par las byed bstan pa srung ngo / /sku ma nges 
25.3(1): pa shel gyi rna ru 'od 'phro ba las sogs cir yang sprul lo/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon 
25.4(1): gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ tshe spungs zla ba rgyal mtshan las sogs mkhas grub 
25.5(1): mang po la sgros 'dogs bcad/ theg dgu thugs su chud/ mkhas par blo sbyangs/
25.6(1): btsun por khrims bsrungs/ me ri this las sogs pa bsgrubs pas/ mthu dang rdzu 
25.7(1): 'phrul dang ldan/ dka' ba mang po spyad/ rgyal po lig mi rkya'i bla'i mchod gnas su 
25.8(1): bzhugs/ de dus mchog gi dngos grub ma thob pas/ nga rang yin bsam nga che ba'i 
25.9(1): nga rgyal yod pa la/ rje sprul pa'i sku ta pi ra tsa de/ hri tsar sprul te byon nas/ skal 
25.10(1): ldan gyi yon mchod gnyis po'i/ dregs pa'i nga rgyal bcom/ rig pa'i gnas lugs 
25.11(1): bstan/ bcing tshad kyi sgrog las bkrol nas/ mnyam pa'i thang la phyung te/ rig pa 
25.12(1): rang sa zin par byas so/ /de nas bka' rgyud lung rim bzhin gzhung na yod pa ltar 
25.13(1): gnang ngo / /rtogs thob dus mnyam skyes nas/ sprul pa'i sku dang mtshungs par 'gro 
25.14(1): don mdzad do/ /rnam mkhyen gyi sangs rgyas su gyur pa lags so/ /
25.15(1): 7 ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ pha ba rgyal gzigs gsas chung gi lo rgyus la lnga/
25.16(1): dang po lo rgyus ni/ rgyal po khri ral pa can gyi sku srung ni/ ya ngal gsas rgyal dang 
25.17(1): thod dkar sman skyid gnyis yin/ bla mchod rgyal tig gsas chung yin/ dus der 
25.18(1): gyer spungs chen po snang bzher lod pos/ zhang zhung khri sde'i mi la snod brtags 
25.19(1): pas/ dmu tsog ge bu chung lo gsum pa gcig dang / pha wa rgyal tig gsas chung lo 
25.20(1): bdun cu don gsum pa las ma rnyed/ rgyal gzigs gsas chung de ni/ mtshan nyid 
25.21(1): thams cad ma rmongs par mkhyen pas/ tshogs gsog pa'i yan lag thams cad la 
26.1(1): mkhas pa/ ge ma sang gi bu 'am/ sha zan srin po'i bu 'am/ khro chu'i brag lta bu zhig 
26.2(1): bzhugs/ dbang ni sa bdag rgyal pos kyang bsgyur mi btub pa/ bslu ru lha'i bu 
26.3(1): mos kyang mi khugs pa/rdzas gtong phod che ba ni yid bzhin gyi nor bu dang 'dra ba 
26.4(1): zhig bzhugs so/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can 
26.5(1): gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ gyer spungs chen po snang bzher lod pos/ lo lnga ru 
26.6(1): phyi mtshams bcad nas/ gro ga'i sbu gu la zhal gzugs nas snyan du dgongs pas 
26.7(1): brgyud do/ /der chung ma rog shud za dge ma dang / bu tsha ming sring gsum bor nas 
26.8(1): 'phring chags med par byas so/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du bzhugs 
26.9(1): pa ni/ gnas me rgyung dkar nag bya ba/ byin gyis brlabs pa'i gnas der bzhugs 
26.10(1): te/ rten pa'i tshe ni sum brgya dang bdun cu bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang 
26.11(1): gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ sku lus khyad par can gzi byin mtshan 
26.12(1): dang ldan zhing / gzhan gyi yid du 'ong pa dang / gsung khyad par can gyis gzhan 
26.13(1): bka' nyan pa'i ngag gi nus pa dang ldan zhing / thugs kyis bsgrubs pa'i sngags kyi 
26.14(1): theg pa la/ gsang sngags this sngags rigs sngags gsum shin tu grub pa'i rtags 
26.15(1): mngon du grub pas/ mchog thun mong gi dngos grub ci snyed cing mnga' ba lags 
26.16(1): so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas nyams kyi man ngag 
26.17(1): btab nas/ lo gcig nas yar sangs rgyas la re mi che ba/ mar sems can la 
26.18(1): dogs mi tsha bar rtogs so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ dmu tsog ge'i lo rgyus la lnga/

26.21(1): 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ pha

27.6(1): ma dang mnyam pa lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla

27.10(1): yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ gdung rus ni gu rib yab gu rib ston pa rgyung nge dang / yum 
27.11(1): rog shud za a lo sman bya ba yin no/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/
27.12(1): bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ bla ma dmu tsog ge dang mjal nas/
27.13(1): bzhi bcu zhe bdun pa la gdams ngag gnang ba lags so/ /gsum pa sa gnas 
27.14(1): khyad par can gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ shangs shel rong bya ba byin 
27.15(1): gyis brlabs pa'i gnas der bzhugs/ brten pa'i tshe ni brgya dang bcu gsum 
27.16(1): bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ thun 
27.17(1): mong dang mchog gi dngos grub gnyis ka ma rmongs par mnga' bsnyems pa lags 
27.18(1): so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ gdams ngag btab nas

28.1(1): te/ yab ni gu rib khro rgyal dang / yum ni ra mo lu gu bya ba yin/ gnyis pa las 
28.2(1): 'phro dang skal pa ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ji ltar mjal na/ dmu 
28.3(1): shod tram ni/ bla ma dmu tsog ge'i yab kyi mched po yin te/ de yang bzhi bcu pa 
28.4(1): la zhen pa log nas/ bla ma dmu tso stangs la zhing khal lnga thog dang bcas pa phul 
28.5(1): nas/ gdams ngag zhus pas thugs la btags so/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par 
28.6(1): gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ gangs sta rgo bya ba byin gyis brlabs pa'i 
28.7(1): gnas/ nyi ma lung gi g.yon ngos/ pha bong ngar ba der bzhugs/ brten pa'i tshe ni 
28.8(1): brgya dang bcu bdun bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan 
28.9(1): grub rtags ni/ rtsal grub rtags bsam gyis mi khyab pa lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa 
28.10(1): mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ gdams ngag btab nas zhag bcu bdun nas/
28.11(1): skye shi'i rtsa ba chod/ rtogs pa mngon du gyur nas sangs rgyas dang mnyam pa lags 
28.12(1): so/! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ dmu rgyal ba blo gros kyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang 
28.13(1): ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ gdung rus gu rub yab gu rub tsu 
28.14(1): gu bya ba dbul po zhig yin/ gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' 
28.15(1): drin can gyi bla ma dang ji ltar mjal na/ tshe stod la lug rdzi kho na byas/ bzhi bcu 
28.16(1): zhe lnga lon nas zhen pa log ste/ gangs chen sta rgo la shod tram chen po bzhugs pa'i 
28.17(1): drung du mjal/ bla ma'i nye gnas lo dgu byas nas/ gdams pa zhus pas thugs la

28.21(1): dngos grub 'byung ba/ shin tu grub thag nye ba'i gnas yod pa/ mi dang mi min 'du 
29.1(1): ba'i gnas der bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub 
29.2(1): rtags ni/ shin tu mang bar mnga' ba lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun 
29.3(1): mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas nyams kyi gdams ngag btab nas/ lo gcig mtshon 
29.4(1): pa'i tshig phyir 'breng nas ma grol/ lo gcig dpe don lung phyir 'breng nas ma grol/
29.5(1): de nas zla ba gcig la bla ma'i gdams ngag la rtogs pa bcug nas bsgom pas/
29.6(1): lus sems 'khor 'das kyi sa gang la yang ma reg par/ sangs rgyas kyi dgongs pa 
29.7(1): dang mnyam pa lags so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ dpon chen btsan po'i lo rgyus 
29.8(1): la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ yul da rog gi 
29.9(1): brag ri na/ gdung rus thog lha zhig yin/ yab sku gshen thog lha rtse mo dang / yum 
29.10(1): ni mang wer za rgyan chung ma gnyis la/ lo bcu gnyis su sras med cing yod dus na/
29.11(1): nyin zhig bud med gsum la chags bcol nas/ mo rang gis brums la bsnyas nas 
29.12(1): yod tsam na/ nyams snang la nub kyi brag rong dkar po'i gseb nas/ rin po che'i 
29.13(1): brum khrol le ba'i nang nas/ sprul pa'i khye'u mtshan ldan zhig yong nas/ des mo la 
29.14(1): spyod pa rmis tsam na/ phyi lo dus su sras gcig bltas pa ni/ dpon btsan po yin 
29.15(1): no/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang 
29.16(1): ji ltar mjal na/ lo bdun brgyad lon nas kyang dge ba gcig pu byed pa byung 
29.17(1): ngo / /lo bcu gnyis nas zang zang lha brag tu/ dmu rgyal ba blo gros bzhugs pa'i 
29.18(1): drung du mjal/ gdams pa zhus pas thugs la btags nas/ zang zing gi 'bul 
29.19(1): ba mang po drin lan du phul lo/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du brten 
29.20(1): pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ yab yum gnyis grong nas/ g.yas ru shangs kyi ri rtse

39.10(1): pas/ rmi lam du rgya mtsho'i gting na yid bzhin gyi nor bu yod zer nas phyin pas 
39.11(1): nor bu rin po che 'od zer sna lnga 'phro ba zhig khug nas steng du thon nas nga las

48.19(1): blo sbyangs/ rtsa bdun lon nas yar byon btsun mo gnyis blangs te sras med/ ban 
48.20(1): btsun gral khrigs se bar bskor nas rtsod pa byas te ma thub/ bon po lce thang ba bya 
48.21(1): bar 'dug pas khas mi len zer ba yang byung / bshad rgyud kyi gdams pa gter ma 
49.1(1): 'di la/ mkhas pa phul du byung ba yin par grags pa thob nas/ dus der gter kha 
49.2(1): bcu gsum tsam gyi bon la/ dri gda' dka' thub mdzad pa'i dus su/ 'di ltar gyi 
49.3(1): snang ba bden zhen med par/ rdzun snang sgyu ma lta bur shes nas ri kha gcig tu phyin/
49.4(1): mig ma btsum par bar snang la bltas nas/ gar phyin sar gtan par 'dug mi 
49.5(1): kun gyis bsnyon pa yin zer zhing / ri kha nas bkug cing nya ra byas/ ri la gcig 
49.6(1): pur 'gro dus der/ mthong snang nyams snang mang po byung / khyad par dpon btsan 
49.7(1): pos sprin brag gi bar nas/ lung ston dang dngos grub mang po thob/ gnyis pa 
49.8(1): bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ se bon khro rgyal dang skabs don 
49.9(1): dang gnad don bcu gsum gyi bon gtam byas/ skabs don 'di 'dra shes pa khyed 
49.10(1): kyis su la zhus byas pas/ ngas bla ma lha'i rgyud 'dzin pa'i 'or bon kun 'dul la 
49.11(1): zhus zer/ 'di la 'dis mi tshad pa'i 'phro zhig yod snyam nas/ 'or sgom can du 
49.12(1): byon nas zhus pas/ khyed rgya mtsho tsam gyis mi ngom bar/ nga'i nya mig tsam la 
49.13(1): gsungs/ de ga zhu ba lags byas pas/ zla ba phyed dang gsum la tshig don ma lus 
49.14(1): par/ nyams rgyud rgyas bsdus yi ge la thebs pa lags so/ /yang ston shes rab rgyal 
49.15(1): mtshan la/ bla ma kun 'dul gyis lung bstan nas/ mnga' ris stod du rgyug khyed la 
49.16(1): rgan phrug gnyis kyang yong / bu slob yang mang du yong gsungs nas/ stod skya ru ru 
49.17(1): dgon gnas btab nas bzhugs/ glo stod du 'gro don zhig la byon nas/ gshegs 
49.18(1): lam zhig na cho lo ba mang po zhig 'dug /dum pad bzhugs byin rlabs zhu zer der 
49.19(1): bzhugs pas chol sngags la/ nyi zla mig gis mi mthong bar rong rtog med zhig po 
49.20(1): zer gyin 'dug nas/ de 'dra gang na yod dris pas/ rdzogs pa chen po zhang zhung 
49.21(1): snyan rgyud la grub pa thob pa/ rtogs ldan chen po zhig phu ya gi dgon pa na/ rong 
50.1(1): rtog med zhig po zer ba'i nyi zla mig gis mi mthong ba zhig yod zer/ de thos pas 
50.2(1): de la mos gus dang dad pa dpag tu med pa skyes te/ ngas kyang rdzogs pa chen po 
50.3(1): zhang zhung snyan rgyud shes/ ga dar byed dgongs nas/ nang par mjal du 'gro ba'i 
50.4(1): phyag rten dang / tshogs 'khor las sogs pa'i grabs byas/ de'i nub mo rong rtog 
50.5(1): med zhig po'i rmi lam du/ nam stod bud med cig yong nas khyed kyi slob ma la spang 
50.6(1): la nam gshen gyi sprul pa zhig yong par yod pas/ de dang mjal kha thongs la zhang 
50.7(1): zhung snyan rgyud kyi bon rdzogs par ston zer ba'i lung ston byung /    nam smad bon po 
50.8(1): sngags pa'i cha byad can/ ral pa sil ma thor cog tu bcings pa/ la la ro stod na 
50.9(1): nyi le byas pa/ smang ra rgya zhol le ba sha la 'jol shag dkar mo gyon pa/ de steng na 
50.10(1): phod kha sngon po zhig de steng na cam se dmar po zhig gon/ rked la lcags phur 
50.11(1): gcig gzer ba zhig mjal du mtshan ltas su byung / de nas sang nyi dros la/ nye 
50.12(1): gnas na re/ 'u la gdong skya nas yong ba'i bon po zhig mjal zhu yin gda' zhus 
50.13(1): pas/ ci 'dra zhig 'dug gsungs pas/ nam bza' dang sngags pa'i cha byad 'di 
50.14(1): 'dra gda' zhus pas/ mdang gi mtshan lam du byung pa der 'dug gsungs/ mjal 
50.15(1): bas chog gsungs nas mjal lo/ /de dus yang ston gyis zhus pa/ zhang zhung snyan 
50.16(1): rgyud sngags sems kyi skor/ bdag gis kyang zhus nas yod lags zhus pas/ khyod 
50.17(1): kyi de rnams nyams rgyud dang sngags su 'dug /nga la bka' rgyud skor dpon btsan 
50.18(1): po nas/ gu ge shes rab blo ldan la gsungs pa'i bka' rgyud skor bzhi bya ba/ phyi lta 
50.19(1): ba spyi gcod bya ba ngas lung sgom la bshad tshar bas/ khyod rang lung sgom la zhus 
50.20(1): shig /gcig rgyud yin pas bshad du mi 'dod gsungs nas/ skor gsum po man 
50.21(1): ngag tshang par zhus so/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du brten pa'i tshe du 
51.1(1): bzhugs pa ni/ gar bzhugs bder gshegs lha'i pho brang du byin gyis rlabs pa/
51.2(1): brten pa'i tshe bla ma'i bka' bzhin ma bsgrub ste/ gdams pas bstan pa snga bas 
51.3(1): len nam/ phag bon po'i yug sa mo zhig la bshad pa ma byas par/ yi ge ris shig 
51.4(1): bstan pas len nam/ bsnyung nas drug cu rtsa gsum pa la sku 'das so/ /bzhi pa 
51.5(1): thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ sgra tshig tha snyad la mkhas/
51.6(1): mthu rtsal yon tan grub rtags bsam du med/ mkha' 'gro ye shes gsal bya ba'i 
51.7(1): mthong snang la/ sa thob rig 'dzin dam tshig can gyi bar chod sel/ lam sna 'dren/
51.8(1): yid ches so/ /tshe snga ma rgyal po'i sras/ de yi stobs kyis bla ma rnams dang mjal 
51.9(1): lo/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas nyams kyi gdams 
51.10(1): ngag btab nas/ dus gnas thams cad du 'brel med 'gyur med kyi dbyings la 
51.11(1): mtshon du med par rtogs nas/ sa la gnas pa'i g.yung drung sems dpar gyur to/ /
51.12(1): 'di man yang ston nas byang rgyud du gyes pa'o/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ lung sgom 
51.13(1): rtog med kyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob cing / yul gtsang pa zhig 
51.14(1): yin/ gdung rus lung / gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin 
51.15(1): can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ spang la nam gshen la gsang ba'i snying gtam 
51.16(1): tshig gsum zhus/ yang spang la nam gshen gyis lta ba spyi gcod zhus/ bla ma 'khrul 
51.17(1): med la nyams rgyud dang spyi gcod zhus/ don la phar zhu tshur byas so/ /gsum pa sa 
51.18(1): gnas khyad par can gang du bzhugs pa ni/ gtsang gi ri khrod 'grims kyin 
51.19(1): bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/
51.20(1): 'dzin pa phyogs 'dzin dang bral cing / rtsal grub rtags dpag tu med pa zhig 
51.21(1): mnga' ba lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ so ma la 
52.1(1): ngang gis bltas pas/ de las 'das sa med pas phu thag chod do/ /zhes gsungs 
52.2(1): pas/ lung sgom gyis gtsang gi ri khrod 'grims kyin nyams su blangs pas/ yid ches 
52.3(1): kyi bde ba shar/ rig pa'i dmar thag chod do/ ! bla ma de'i (gong ma 'am ) slob ma ni/
52.4(1): 'khrul med zhig po'i lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob cing / yul glo 
52.5(1): smad kyi sha ri ba zhig yin/ gdung rus snyel/ gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par ldan 
52.6(1): pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ spang lha nam gshen dang /
52.7(1): lung sgom rtog med dang / sha ri'i 'khrul med dang gsum gcig la gcig zhu byas/
52.8(1): gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du bzhugs pa ni/ glo bo sha ri'i dben gnas 
52.9(1): dang ri khrod 'grims shing bzhugs/ bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon 
52.10(1): tan grub rtags ni/ 'jig rten gyi dri mas ma gos pa dang / snang ba sgyu mar shes 
52.11(1): pas grub rtags la thogs rdugs med pa/ yon tan bsam las 'das so/ /lnga pa 
52.12(1): rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bcos med rang sor bzhag pas/
52.13(1): don gyi ngo bor 'dug pa/ de ltar nyams su longs zhes gsungs pas/ sha ri'i snyel 
52.14(1): sgom 'khrul med kyi rgyud la/ blo thag chod yid ches kyi go ba skyes nas/ ri khrod 
52.15(1): 'grims shing bskyangs pas/ lo gcig nas gdeng thob bo/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/
52.16(1): gnyag sgom ri pa sher tshul gyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob cing /
52.17(1): yul dwang ra'i spyan dgon/ gdung rus gnyag /nang tsho rgya/ gnyis pa las 'phro dang 
52.18(1): skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/ lung sgom rtog 
52.19(1): med dang snyel sgom 'khrul med dang mjal/ bka' rgyud rin po che skor bzhi dang /
52.20(1): man ngag tshang bar thugs la btags/ gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du 
52.21(1): bzhugs pa ni/ gangs chen rta rgo (sgo)dge rgan gyi ri/ khyad par dwang ra'i ri spyan 
53.1(1): dgon gyi ze phug tu bug sgo la bzhugs so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi 
53.2(1): yon tan grub rtags ni/ thugs shes la thogs rdugs med/ u ri bla ma las sogs 
53.3(1): la bka' skyong gis lung ston pa/ mi ma yin gyis zhabs tog dang / rtsal grub rtags 
53.4(1): mnga' ba lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ yin min 
53.5(1): sems kyi ngo bo la brtags pas/ nges par go zhes gsungs pas/ sher tshul gyi rgyud 
53.6(1): la dad mos bden pa'i yid ches skyes nas/ nyams su blangs pas/ blo bde zhing 
53.7(1): gdengs khong du chud pa lags so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ u ri bsod nams 
53.8(1): rgyal mtshan gyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo 
53.9(1): rgyus ni/ yul ni bi ri nang skor ba/ gdung rus ldong yin/ yab a rgyal yum gra za 
53.10(1): sgron ne bya ba yin/ chung ngun gyi mtshan a mchog /lo lnga pa la yum 'das/ ma yar 
53.11(1): mos mnar nas sdug pa byung / lo bcu gsum pa la yab la sras mang bas/ rab 
53.12(1):  dge sbyor la zhu ba phul bas gnang / khang gsar bas mtshan bsod nams rgyal 
53.13(1): mtshan du gsol/ lo nyi shu rtsa ba(lnga )la slob dpon ras ston bon zhig blo bde/ de 
53.14(1): rnams la gab mdzod sgrags pa skor gsum yang rtse zhus shing ga dar byas/ lo sum 
53.15(1): cu pa la gangs ri mtsho gsum mnga' ris stod kyi gnas ri bskor/ gnyis pa las 
53.16(1): 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma la ci ltar mjal na/ ri pa 
53.17(1): sher tshul de spyad dgon gyi yang dben ze phug na/ sku mtshams 'dag sgo byas 
53.18(1): bzhugs dus/ de nub bla ma'i mtshan lam du/ nam stod bud med dkar mo sha la 
53.19(1): gos smug po gyon pa/ steng na re thul zhig gon pa/ gser g.yu'i rgyan cha khrol ler 
53.20(1): btags pa zhig gis/ khyo thong lo bcu gsum lon pa zhig khrid nas byung / 'di khyod 
53.21(1): kyi bu yin pas/ khyod la ci yod kyi gdams pa 'di la byin cig zer ro/ /tho rangs 
54.1(1): mtshan lam du/ nyi ma shar 'dug gtor ma btang ran 'dug snyam nas/ nyi rar 
54.2(1): byon pas nyi ran sdong po bskor re ba zhig la/ me tog kha dog sna tshogs khra phung nge 
54.3(1): skyes 'dug pa rmis/ de nas nam langs nas thugs dam mdzad cing yod tsam na/
54.4(1): chu 'bul du bug sgor byung tsam na/ chu skyel ba na re bla ma la mjal zer ba'i bya bral 
54.5(1): ba zhig gda' zhus pas/ ji 'dra zhig 'dug gos slag ci gon 'dug gsungs pas/
54.6(1): khong bi ri yin zer/ lo sum cu tsam lon pa/ sha mdog skya'u re ba/ bem po dkar 
54.7(1): po can zhig gda' zhus pas/ mdang gi mtshan ltas rnams dran nas/ 'phrad pas 
54.8(1): chog khrid la shog gsungs/ khong sgor khrid yong nas bug sgor mjal btang bas/
54.9(1): dpon slob gnyis po mjal ba dang / phug pa la nyi ma shar ba dus mnyam byung ngo / /
54.10(1): bla ma'i gsung nas rten 'brel bzang ste/ lo rgyus kyi gtam mang du mdzad do/ /
54.11(1): mdang nga la rmi ltas kyang bzang po byung / nyid las ldan zhig 'dug /nga la zhang 
54.12(1): zhung snyan rgyud bya ba'i bon/ gzhan su la med pa'i bon zab mo zhig yod/ sngar su la 
54.13(1): yang bstan pa med pas/ nyid la bstan gyi/ nyin rgyags dgon par bsod snyoms 
54.14(1): gyis/ dgong mo shar du 'gro tshul gyis la/ srod la 'dir log la shog /nga yis 
54.15(1): gdams ngag bstan gyi gsungs so/ /khong gis kyang zhal ta bzhin bgyis nas srod 
54.16(1): la byon no/ /bug sgo las 'dzul nang du bcug nas bzhugs so/ /bla ma'i zhal nas 
54.17(1): chu skyel ba la nga zla ba gcig mtshams dam pa zhig la bsdod pas/ mi su yang ma 
54.18(1): gtong sgor tho zhig brtsegs la zhog /chu ca mang ba re ma chag par skyol gsungs nas/
54.19(1): gtor ma bsdus pa re mdzad nas/ zla ba gcig gi bar du zhang zhung snyan rgyud kyi 
54.20(1): bon rnams rdzogs par zhus pas/ bla ma'i zhal nas da nga ka na so rgas/ sngar dang 
54.21(1): slob ma la gdams pa 'di bstan pa'i snod du rung ba dka' yin 'dug /'thor bu 
55.1(1): tsam re min pa rdzogs par bstan pa med/ da khyod la rdzogs par bstan pa yin 
55.2(1): pas/ btang bzhag gi tshod la mkhas par gyis la/ las ldan byung na brgya la yang 
55.3(1): thon/ snod med byung na gcig la yang ma ston gsungs nas/ phyag dpe yang gnang 
55.4(1): ngo / /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ bi 
55.5(1): ri phyogs su bzhugs/ dang po gab pa la go ba skyes nas/ bon zhig blo bde'i drung du 
55.6(1): rdzogs chen la rtogs pa shar/ gnyag sgom ri pa la zhang zhung snyan rgyud skor bzhi ma 
55.7(1): bu cha lag dang bcas pa zhus/ bla mas nyams kyi man ngag gnang bas/ 'khor 
55.8(1): 'das dbyer med du rtogs/ sku tshe yang mthar phyin lo brgyad cu gya gcig pa la mya 
55.9(1): ngan las 'das te/ nam mkha' g.ya' dag gdung ring bsrel mang du byung ngo / /
55.10(1): bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ mkhyen pa la thogs 
55.11(1): pa med/ 'chad nyan rtsod gsum la blo rab ste/ nyi 'od rgyan u ri'i stong thun/ khrid 
55.12(1): rim gsal ba'i me long / de las sogs bon skor 'grel pa mang / bu slob yang 
55.13(1): kong tsha bkra shis dar/ bsod nams ye shes/ ma tang g.yu rtse las sogs 'gro ba la 
55.14(1): phan thogs pa mang ngo / /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas 
55.15(1): dran pa sna tshogs dngos med du shar/ dngos med du grol/ de la mi gzhig mi 
55.16(1): brtags gsungs pas/ u ri'i rgyud la bla ma la mos gus dang / gdams ngag la 
55.17(1): nges 'byung gi go ba skyes nas/ gcig dril du bskyangs pas/ zla ba lnga nas/ dran 
55.18(1): shar gyi rnam rtog thams cad ci bzhin pa'i ngang du/ sbrul mdud grol ba bzhin du 
55.19(1): khrol gyis song nas/ rang rgyud la rtogs pa'i ye shes shar te mthar phyin pa'o/ ! bla 
55.20(1): ma de'i slob ma ni/ bsod nams ye shes kyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus 
55.21(1): thob cing / yul dar lding pa/ gdung rus snyel/ nang mtsho snya yin/ gnyis pa las 
56.1(1): 'phro dang skal par ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ci ltar mjal na/
56.2(1): gshen ye shes blo gros kyis brdzangs nas/ bi ri'i yul du u ri bsod nams rgyal 
56.3(1): mtshan dang mjal/ bka' rgyud rin po che phyi lta ba spyi gcod/ nang man ngag dmar 
56.4(1): khrid/ gsang ba rig pa gcer mthong / yang gsang gnas lugs phugs chod/
56.5(1): bka' rgyud nyams rgyud lag len dang bcas pa zhus pa lags so/ /gsum pa sa 
56.6(1): gnas khyad par can gang du bzhugs pa ni/ dar lding du phebs nas gshen chen 
56.7(1): po'i drung du rdzogs pa chen po bka' nyams gnyis ka phul/ slob ma yang mu lto ba ye 
56.8(1): shes rin chen las sogs grangs mang bar smin no/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas 
56.9(1): skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ sgrub pa tshe gcig gi rnal 'byor pa yin zhing /
56.10(1): grub rtags dpag med mnga' ba lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong 
56.11(1): ma yin pa ni/ blo rang sor bzhag la rig pa rten dang phrol/ zhes gsungs pas/ de 
56.12(1): sgro snya bsod nams ye shes kyi rgyud la/ yid ches kyi go ba lhag gi skyes/ mi rtag pa'i 
56.13(1): nges 'byung rgyud la shar nas/ zhe bcad dang brtson 'grus kyis nyams su blangs 
56.14(1): pas/ gnas lugs kyi don brtan pa thob bo/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ rgya ston ye 
56.15(1): shes rin chen gyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo

57.1(1): spa rgyal ba blo gros la/ khro bo dbang chen dbal phur me ri/ rig 'dzin mkha' 'gro 
57.2(1): dang / bon mang po'i dbang lung zhus/ nyi shu rtsa bdun pa la dar lding du kun 
57.3(1): mkhyen ye shes blo gros dang / slob dpon bo dong ba gzhon nu blo gsal la/ sde snod 
57.4(1): kyi bon la thugs sbyong mdzad/ sum cu pa la kun mkhyen pa la cog sgron zhus/ khyad 
57.5(1): par sgro snya bsod nams ye shes la/ bka' rgyud skor gsum nyams rgyud rnams kyi 
57.6(1): lag len tshang par zhus/ yi dam gtso mchog gi sku dkar por zhal gzigs/ rig 
57.7(1): 'dzin mkha' 'gro mang po la grub pa bsnyems/ gsang sngags rang sems su thag 
57.8(1): chod/ theg dgu'i dbye ba dang don ma rmongs par thugs su chud pa lags so/
57.9(1): gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ chu mo ri 
57.10(1): las sogs gnas chen grub gnas kun tu/ nyams dang drod rtags mang du byung /
57.11(1): bla ma rgyal mtshan la/ bon dri med lhan skyes zhu 'am bsam ste/ rang sems bla mar 
57.12(1): shes pas/ bla ma'i spros pa yang de nas chod do/ /yar byon bla ma gshen 'das nas/
57.13(1): sku mang po byon 'dug /bla ma'i 'das mchod la rgyu zog kun btang / bya btang sngon 
57.14(1): ma de nas mdzad/ stod la byon spa rgyal ba blo gros dgung lo sum cu so bdun pa la 
57.15(1): 'das nas/ rten sha ri ram sum cu so bdun byon pa dang mjal/ lung bstan yang 
57.16(1): byas pa 'dug nas mos gus drag po skyes/ sa phyogs dge brag tu bye ma la dgun 
57.17(1): rgyags bcud len mdzad/ mi ma yin gyis bye ma rtsam par bsgyur ba'i snang ba byung 
57.18(1): ngo / /de nas rkya rgya'i phu na dgon pa lha rdzongs bya bar dbyar rgyags zwa la bcud len 
57.19(1): mdzad/ chu bar gyi dgon pa gra chung bya bar/ zhag bzhi bcu chu la bcud len mdzad/
57.20(1): dgon pa gra lung du tshogs 'khor la byon zer gshegs pa la/ bshos mar zhig 
57.21(1): drangs pa de gsol nas/ zla ba gcig cang yang ma gsol/ sku rgyags mdzad de 
58.1(1): khams kyi yang zas la sred pa chod/ yang rkya rgya'i rdzong ri la dgon pa thob zer ba la/
58.2(1): snying rje mi rtag pa'i zhal gdams gsungs so/ /zur kha dgon par lo gsum 'dam 
58.3(1): pa gsol zhing dka' ba spyad/ kun bzang a skor gyi zhal gzigs mtshan bcas 
58.4(1): gang yang mi mdzad/ na bza' rtsi ber khyi thul re dang / zhal lu thod skyogs re min 
58.5(1): pa gzung 'dzin gyi 'phrang las grol lo/ /res zas bshos bco brgyad sha mar dang 
58.6(1): bcas pa dus mnyam du gsol lo/ /res rgyun gcod zhag nyer gcig zag pa zas 
58.7(1): dang bral bar bzhugs so/ /shi ri ru bla ma dpal ldan seng ge bzhugs pa'i dus su/
58.8(1): rtsam pa khal gcig gi zan dang sha chang gis brgyan pa gsol zer/ bla ma'i dgon pa 
58.9(1): sle mi bya bar byang bya ba'i tshogs 'khor dus/ pha 'bab char khud gang ba dus thog 
58.10(1): gcig la gsol/ zla ba gcig zas dang zag pa'i rgyud chad do/ /khong gis gsungs

67.21(1): dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan dang grub rtags ni/ rgyu 'bras kyi las ye nas dag 
68.1(1): pa'i rtags su/ dang po nas kyang yi dam lha'i zhal khums shing / nyams rtogs 
68.2(1): phyogs med nas 'char ba dang / bstan bshig gi dgra dang brgyal pa la/ lha srung gi 
68.3(1): thabs ldan gyis bka' lung bstan nas/ rang gis shi slus kyi dun tshe kha phung du 
68.4(1): gtong ba dang / dkor khyu ar pos khyer ba la/ mthu stobs kyis rdzu 'phrul mngon du 
68.5(1): bstan nas/ g.yag bshas pa'i khog par/ drag po'i dbal gtor dmar zang nger 
68.6(1): yong ba dang / thugs shes zang thal du mnga' bas/ las kyi slob bu zhig 'ong gi/
68.7(1): rtag 'dzin gyis gags ma byed gsungs pa dang / khyung ston drang srong pa'i phyag nas/
68.8(1): tshe 'das kyi byang bu rlung gis khyer ba thugs rje'i stobs kyis phyis bla ma'i drung du sleb 
68.9(1): pa dang / de las sogs te thun mong gi dngos grub dang grub rtags yon tan ni/
68.10(1): grangs las 'das pa zhig mnga' ba lags so/ /spyir yang bla ma de ni btsun por 
68.11(1): khrims srung / mkhas par blo sbyangs/ rtogs pa shar bar nyams su blangs/
68.12(1): bsgrubs pa'i grub rtags mngon du gyur pas/ mig gis mthong pa'i sangs rgyas 
68.13(1): dngos yin no/ /lung 'dul ba gling grags las kyang / la stod glo ba'i sa stod du/
68.14(1): ya ngal gdung la 'bum rje'i mtshan/ de yang nga'i byin gyis brlabs/ zhes bla chen 
68.15(1): gyis gsungs te/ de na sprul pa'i sku yin par gsungs shing / glo dol 'brog gsum 
68.16(1): du bstan pa'i dbu yang de nas btsugs so/ /lnga pa bla mas nyams kyi man ngag 
68.17(1): btab nas/ rtogs grol dus mnyam du gyur te/ yid ches kyi bde ba khong du chud/
68.18(1): rnam mkhyen gyi sangs rgyas su gyur pa lags so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ khong pa 
68.19(1): rang gi gcung po bkra shis rgyal mtshan gyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus 
68.20(1): thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ gcen po dang 'dra ste/ yang ston shes rab rgyal 
68.21(1): mtshan gnyan mo bkra shis lcam mo/ /gsang sngags phyi nang gi skor rnams dang po rang 
69.1(1): nas mkhyen/ sku tshe'i stod la sngags pa mdzad nas/ chag gi glang phrug ma zhig yum 
69.2(1): du bzhes pa la/ sras gcig 'khrungs te ya ngal sngags pa bya ba/ gsang sngags 
69.3(1): bskyed rdzogs la grub pa thob pa zhig yod do/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par 
69.4(1): ldan pas/ bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ji ltar mjal na/ sras kyi lo gsum lon 
69.5(1): nas btsun mo gum ste/ btsun mo gcig nye ring kun gyis len zer ba la/ 'khor ba 
69.6(1): la zhen pa log nas ma bzhes par/ dgung lo sum cu so gcig lon pa dang / ston 
69.7(1): pa'i zhabs kyi bcag sa g.yas ru gtsang du gshegs so/ /snyi mo bzang ri'i grwa sar 
69.8(1): zhang bar thang pa sum ston rnam gnyis kyi drung du/ rgyud sde bshad nyan bslabs/
69.9(1): gshen chen ye shes blo gros kyi drung du/ so so thar pa'i sdom pa mnos/ 'gro ba'i mgon 
69.10(1): po sman gong pa'i drung du dbang bzhi rdzogs par zhus/ khyad par gcen po 'bum rje 
69.11(1): 'od kyi drung du/ rdzogs pa chen po snyan rgyud kyi gdams ngag zhus nas/ theg pa 
69.12(1): gsum ldan gyi bon la dka' ba spyad nas grub pa thob pa lags so/ /gsum pa sa 
69.13(1): gnas khyad par can gang du brten pa'i tshe du bzhugs pa ni/ smug le gangs brag gi 
69.14(1): g.yas mdun/ lha klu gdug pa'i yul kha rang 'jigs pa'i yul rong du/ klu brag 
69.15(1): gnyan zhes bya ba/ bla chen po dran pa nam mkha'/ mthu chen mi dgu/ zhang zhung gi 
69.16(1): grub thob kha la rag sha/ rag sha klog 'phreng / kha khri sho na ya dang gsum/ rig 'dzin 
69.17(1): sems dpa' rnams kyis byin gyis brlabs pa'i sa gnas yin te/ gnas gzhan du 
69.18(1): lo dang zla bar bsgrub pa bas kyang / gnas der zhag dang za ma bsgrub pa/ grub thag 
69.19(1): nye bar gsungs pas/ de lta bu'i sa gnas khyad par can der bzhugs so/ /brten 
69.20(1): pa'i tshe ni dgung lo brgyad cu rtsa lnga bzhugs nas/ da lo nga'i ming 'pho gsungs nas/
69.21(1): bsnyung ba med par grongs dus bgos te/ dpyid zla tha chung gi nyi shu gnyis la bsnyung 
70.1(1): zug med par sku 'das so/ /bzhi pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub 
70.2(1): rtags ni/ ting nge 'dzin la rtsal 'byong pas/ sngon mo nyi zer la 'gel ba dang /
70.3(1): bsgrubs pa'i grub rtags mngon du shar bas/ phur pa gnyan sa bkra shis la me 
70.4(1): 'bar ba dang / thugs rje tshad med mtha' ru phyin pas/ ri bo la me 'bar ba thugs 
70.5(1): rjes byin rlabs kyis char phab nas bsod pa dang / 'byung ba dbang du 'dus pas/
70.6(1): shugs can rlung la ban tshad du bka' ci stsal nyan pa dang / lha srin dbang du 
70.7(1): 'dus pas/ klu brag gi bdud srin gyis phyag rten dngos su 'bul cing phug pa brko 
70.8(1): ba dang / 'ol kha spur gyi bkag nas zhing la chu 'chu ba dang / ding ri sgang btsan 
70.9(1): las sogs lha srin kun gyis phyag dang gus pa 'bul zhing / bstan pa'i zhabs tog 
70.10(1): byed pa dang / 'gro don la thugs rtse gcig tu dgongs pas sku tshab kyi rten la lung 
70.11(1): bstan thob pa/ zhal lnga phyag bcu pa zhig mgo bo can na yod/ thabs dang snying rje'i 
70.12(1): stobs kyis skad rigs mi mthun pa'i gdul dka' 'dul ba dang / sangs rgyas kyi 
70.13(1): dgongs pa thugs su chud pas/ dus dang gnas skabs thams cad sgrib med mkhyen 
70.14(1): pa'o/ /spyir yang gcen po 'bum rje 'od kyis mi lo bcu bdun brag phug zhwa ru gyon/
70.15(1): gcung po bkra shis rgyal mtshan gyis ri lung rjes kyis bkang nas/ phrin las kyi rnam

70.17(1): grogs mdzad nas/ bstan bshig gi gyi gran cham la phab bo/ /lung bstan lde mig 
70.18(1): las kyang / mnga' ris stod du ya ngal gdung la bkra shis rgyal mtshan gyis/ des

70.20(1): 'ong ba lags so/ /lnga pa rtogs pa mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas 
70.21(1): nyams kyi gdams ngag btab nas/ lus ngag bcud la bor gyin nyams su blangs 
71.1(1): pas/ yid ches kyi bde ba nang nas shar nas/ kun tu bzang po'i sku dang gnyis su 
71.2(1): med par gyur pa lags so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ khong pa rang gi snag dbon 
71.3(1): yin te/ rtogs ldan dbon po ye shes rgyal mtshan gyi lo rgyus la lnga/ dang po gtsang 
71.4(1): ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ sku 'khrungs pa'i yul mus kyi sta mo na/
71.5(1): yab 'o brgyad rog po bya ba dang / yum ya ngal jo lcam gnyis kyi sras su 'khrungs/
71.6(1): gzhon dus yab ar ba yin pa'i rjes su 'breng nas/ dmag chus dang jag rkun 
71.7(1): kyang lo 'ga' byas/ res shig na mo mas na re/ da res rta sngon po snying dom dmar 
71.8(1): po yod pa khugs par 'dug gis/ de khug na nga la blang zer tsam na/ khong rang la

71.16(1): bka' drin can gyi bla ma dang ji ltar mjal na/ sngar gyi g.yul 'khrug dang sdug

77.1(1): 'brel bzang shog gsungs nas/   ston kha cha rkyen ci dang ci yod phyed rin du btsong /

77.4(1): pas bde ru song / bla ma la g.yu mon zho nyi shu rtsa bzhi ri ba zhig phul/ do red 'u 
77.5(1): rang gnyis rmi lam rtogs shig gsungs nas/ brtags pas/ nam gung la mi dkar 
77.6(1): po zhig gis/ dngos grub kyi zhal zas phyag tu phul/ de lan gcig sa la brul nas 
77.7(1): song ba dang / bud med mdzes ma gcig na re/ de brul du phangs pa zhig yin zer 
77.8(1): nas/ de tog gis blangs pa de yang phyis nas gtad de gsol ba rmis/ nam smad bla 
77.9(1): ma btsan po yin zer ba'i rnal 'byor pa sgom zhu khyer ba zhig gis bu khyod 'di 'thung 
77.10(1): gsungs nas/ zhal bu zhig tu skya lteng lteng yod pa zhig gnang nas gsol ba rmis bla 
77.11(1): mas na re ci rmis gsungs/ sngar gyi rmis ltas zhu ba phul/ bla ma na re ngas ni mchod 
77.12(1): rten chen po gcig brtsegs nas/ mgul chu gser gyi bris te rab gnas byas pa 
77.13(1): rmis pas/ nan tar bzang gsungs so/ /da snyan rgyud 'di'i bdag po khyod kyis 
77.14(1): 'ong bar 'dug gi gsungs nas/ gdams ngag skor dmar khrid lag len ma bu 
77.15(1): dang bcas pa rnams thugs la btags so/ /gsum pa sa gnas khyad par can gang 
77.16(1): du bzhugs pa ni/ gangs ri mtsho gsum dbus gtsang ru bzhi/ lho mon yul 'bum 
77.17(1): thang / byang gnam mtsho phyug mo/ stod gu ge ru thog /nub dzA la rda ra/ pu hrang / sle 
77.18(1): mi/ 'om lo/ dol po gru gsum las sogs te/ de rnams kyi gnas chen ri gnyan 
77.19(1): dur khrod kun la bzhugs shing / bdag 'dzin gyi gnas ma bzung ngo / /brten pa'i 
77.20(1): tshe ni bdun cu don gsum bzhes nas/ bsnyung zug med par lus rgya grol lo/ /bzhi 
77.21(1): pa thun mong dang gnas skabs kyi yon tan grub rtags ni/ dang po rang nas kyang 
78.1(1): 'jig rten sgyu mar gzigs shing mkha' 'gro'i lung bstan thob pa dang / ting nge 
78.2(1): 'dzin la brtan pa thob nas nyin mtshan gnyis med du 'dres pa dang / sgrib med ye 
78.3(1): shes kyi spyan gyis bder gshegs zhing khams rigs drug gnas tshul ci ltar mkhyen 
78.4(1): pa dang rig pa rang dbang thob/ ting 'dzin zas su gsol cing 'byung ba chen po 
78.5(1): bcud du rol pa dang / bskyed rdzogs zung 'brel bas yi dam lha zhal phyogs med du 
78.6(1): gzigs pa dang / rdzu 'phrul sprul pa'i zhabs kyis nyin lam gsum gsum dro lam 
78.7(1): gyis gcod pa dang / rang snang dbang du 'dus pas kun gzhi ngar ldan gyi rtsal gyis/
78.8(1): dgra gdon dang gzhan snang zil gyis non pa dang / 'gro don sbas tshul gyis mdzad 
78.9(1): cing / bstan pa thabs kyis spel ba dang / zag med kyi mngon par shes pas gdul 
78.10(1): bya'i las dag ma dag mkhyen pa dang / thugs rje ye khyab kyi byin rlabs kyis skal 
78.11(1): ldan gyi bar chod sel zhing / ting nge 'dzin rang lugs su 'char bar nus pa dang /
78.12(1): sems nyid la rang dbang thob cing smon lam mtha' ru phyin pa dag ci mdzad yon 
78.13(1): tan du 'gro don shugs la rtsol med du grub pa dang / du ma ro gcig tu rtogs pas 
78.14(1): spang blang gnyis su mi 'byed pa dang / sku gsung thugs kyi cha byad kyang rig 'dzin 
78.15(1): dngos su bzhugs shing / mkha' klong dbyings gsum gyi dgongs pa shar bas/ sku 
78.16(1): gsum gyi 'bras bu mngon du gyur nas/ 'gro ba'i don mthar phyin par mdzad do/ /
78.17(1): khyad par du bla ma chen po de ni/ tshe dbang rig 'dzin chen pos byin gyis rlabs pa 
78.18(1): yin te/ zab mo snyan rgyud 'di'i mnga' bdag tu gyur nas/ bstan pa'i rgyal mtshan 
78.19(1): tshugs shing thugs rje snyan pa'i ba dan phyogs bcur khyab pa'o/ /lnga pa rtogs pa 
78.20(1): mngon gyur thun mong ma yin pa ni/ bla mas nyams kyi man ngag btab nas bde ldan 
78.21(1): bsam gling du nyams su blangs pas/ snang ba rang grol du grol/ 'khrul pa rang zhig 
79.1(1): tu zhig /zhen pa gcig chod du chod/ rgyu med dngos med rang dag rtsa bral du rtogs 
79.2(1): te/ tshe dbang ri khrod pa chen po nyid kyi dgongs pa dang gnyis su med par gyur pa 
79.3(1): lags so/ ! bla ma de'i slob ma ni/ bru chen po rgyal ba g.yung drung gi lo rgyus la lnga 
79.4(1): ste/ dang po gtsang ma mi lus thob pa yab dang yum gyi lo rgyus ni/ yul ni g.yas 
79.5(1): ru'i dben sa kha/ gdung rus bru yin/ yab bru zha bsod nams rgyal mtshan la/
79.6(1): sras sku mched bzhi yod pa'i tha ltag yin/ de yang sprul sku 'gro ba'i don la byon pa 
79.7(1): yin pas/ chung nas sbyangs pa'i yon tan du ma dang ldan te/ dgung lo brgyad pa la 
79.8(1): srid pa'i mdzod phugs bshad/ de nas 'dul ba rin po che'i drung du dag pa drang 
79.9(1): srong gi sdom pa blangs te/ tshul ming rgyal ba g.yung drung du mtshan gsol zhing /
79.10(1): bslab pa tshul khrims don dang ldan par mdzad/ gzhan yang phyi nang gsang gsum 
79.11(1): gyi bon sde la/ dbang lung byin rlabs dang bcas pa zhus shing thugs rgyud sbyangs/
79.12(1): khyad par gnas lugs theg chen gyi ngo sprod zhus nas/ rtse gcig yengs med du 
79.13(1): thugs dam mdzad de/ bla ma nyid kyi gsung las kyang / bdag gis kyang dang po 
79.14(1): bsrung sdom gyi bslab pa zhus nas mngon lkog med par bsrungs/ bar du thos 
79.15(1): bsam gyi bka' drin mnos nas sgros 'dogs legs par bcad/ tha mar yang dag 
79.16(1): pa'i gnas lugs rang ngo shes tsam byas pas/ 'di phyi gnyis ka mi khyur tshud pa tsam 
79.17(1): byas pa 'di ni/ sum ldan gyi bla ma de'i bka' drin lags so/ /zhes gsungs so/
79.18(1): gzhan yang dbyil ston khyung rgod rtsal gyi dbon po dbyil ston nam mkha' bsod 
79.19(1): nams dang / lung ston lha gnyan gyi rgyud pa/ lung sgom bkra shis rgyal mtshan dang /
79.20(1): rma ston srid 'dzin gyi rgyud pa rma ston drang srong las sogs pa rnams la yang /
79.21(1): dbang lung gdams pa byin rlabs dang bcas pa zhus/ bla ma rtogs ldan dad pa 
80.1(1): shes rab kyis/ dgung lo lnga bcu rtsa lnga lon pa'i dus/ dbus gtsang gi grwa sa grub 
80.2(1): gnas gnas chen kun bskor zhing khyad par du lho brag tu mtshan ldan 'dul ba'i 
80.3(1): drung du btugs nas/ rdzogs chen a khrid dmar byang / dri med lhan skyes dbang ye 
80.4(1): dbang chen mo las sogs pa'i lung rnams zhus dus/ snyan rgyud kyi gsung gleng mang 
80.5(1): du byung bas/ mtshan ldan pa'i zhal nas/ khyed la snyan rgyud kyi lung rdzogs par 
80.6(1): 'dug pas/ nga rgad po ni zhus kyang so mi bsod pa las med/ khyed kyis lung 'di 
80.7(1): rgyal ba g.yung drung la phog dgos gsungs so/ /gnyis pa las 'phro dang skal par

80.11(1): kyi na bun ma yal bar/ grub thob zam ma chad par snyan nas snyan du brgyud pa'i 
80.12(1): gdams pa khyad par can du 'dug cing / 'di'i sgra thos pa'am tshig tshogs bag re

80.16(1): ya ngal ba gdan sa'i drung du dbang po ri lu gcig bskur nas bang chen pa la zhu 
80.17(1): bskur bas/ dpe rgyud ma bu cha lag dang bcas pa thugs la btags nas/ bla ma'i 
80.18(1): gsungs kyis/ da gdams pa 'di la nyams rgyud dmar khrid gcig yod de/ 'o 
80.19(1): skol ni sa thag ring nas mi 'phrod par 'dug /yi ge la btab tu ni sngar nas kyang 
80.20(1): yi ge med cing gcig rgyud yin pas/ gong ma rnams kyis bka' rgya dam po yod/ da 
80.21(1): 'di na yang nged kyi nyams rgyud thob pa slob ma gcig las med/ de dang 'dzom

96.11(1): bskor ba dang / ma pang gi khrus sgor zhabs bzhag par pad ma brdol zhing 'ja'

116.1(1): pa'i 'dun pa la skyabs gnas kyi thugs kha nas/ raM yaM maM gsum 'phros spyi gtsug tu 
116.2(1): thim pas/ tshe rabs nas bsags pa'i bag chags sdig sgrib thams cad/ raM las 
116.3(1): ye shes kyi me byung nas bcom gyis bsregs/ yaM las rlung byung nas gtor/ maM las 
116.4(1): ye shes kyi chu byung nas bkrus/ bdag lus shel dkar gyi bum pa bzhin/ dbang

116.7(1): sku gsung thugs kyi dbang dang byin rlabs thob par bsam/ de rjes bder gshegs

121.21(1): dkar po 'dab brgyad pa'i dbus kyi lte ba la a dkar po/ 'dab ma brgyad la

125.1(1): sku lnga rang khrid bzhugs so/ /

125.17(1): 'khor can zhig la dmigs pa gtad la blo bzhag go /rigs lnga rgyas khrid du byed na/
126.1(1): dga' ba don grub bsgom du bzhug /phyag na rin po che'i chag shing bsnam pa/ yum 
126.2(1): chu'i lha mo sku la 'khril ba/ phyag g.yas na rin po che'i bum pa bsnams pa/ mkhal 
126.3(1): rtsa la hUM mthing kha/ lce la dza mthing kha bsgom/ hUM dza phaT brjod/ lha bye brag dngos 
126.4(1): med/ yum me'i lha mo/ mchin rtsa la raM dmar po/ lha dge lha gar phyug /yum rlung 
126.5(1): gi lha mo/ glo rtsa la dza ljang khu/ lha gsal ba rang 'byung / yum sa'i lha mo/ mtsher rtsa 
126.6(1): la oM ser po/ lha kun snang khyab pa/ yum nam mkha'i lha mo/ snying rtsa la a dkar po 
126.7(1): snying po 'dren lugs dga' ba don grub 'gres/ de la blo cung zad gtad la snying 
126.8(1): po 'dren/ de nas 'od kyi thig ler gyur ba la blo gtad/ des ma gsal na hUM 'od 
126.9(1): 'khor can la dmigs pa gtad la blo bzhag go /de bzhin rigs bzhi yo yang dpe 
126.10(1): des 'gres te/ bye brag dngos med rim tsug bsgom par bya'o/ /des ni rdzogs sku'i 
126.11(1): khrid la brten nas/ lus gyi rtsa gnad la dbab pa dang / ngag gnad la dbab cing 
126.12(1): blo sbyang ba'o/ /sa ma ya/ de ltar sbyang bas rab 'bring tha gsum gyis/ rab kyi snang 
126.13(1): ba thams cad mi rtag sgyu mar mthong ba dang / ris drug sdug bsngal sangs ba dang /
126.14(1): snang ba sku lngar 'char bar 'gyur ro/ /'bring ris drug gi sdug bsngal mthong ba tsam 
126.15(1): gyis 'jigs shing nyam nga ba dang / bag tsha ba dang skyabs 'gro la mos pa 'jug pa/
126.16(1): rigs lnga'i thugs rjes 'dren pa'i snang ba 'char ba'o/ /tha ma rnams la yang rang re 
126.17(1): ris drug gi gnas na sbyang zhing 'dug pa'i sdug bsngal yong / de byung bas nges shes 
126.18(1): skyes nas/ 'khor ba la zhen pa log pas phyir mi ldog pa'i sems skye bar 'gyur ro/ /
126.19(1): dge'o/
127.1(1): rdzogs pa chen po zhang zhung snyan rgyud las phyi lta ba 
127.2(1): spyi gcod kyi man ngag le'u bcu gnyis pa 
127.3(1): bzhugs so/ /
127.4(1): @#//ka) kun tu bzang po khyab bdal dgongs pa che la phyag 'tshal lo/ /de'i 
127.5(1): don 'di ltar bkrol te bstan pa ni/ 'khor 'das gnyis su ma gyes sngon rol 
127.6(1): du/ sangs rgyas sems can bya ba'i tha snyad med/ shes rig rgyal po kun gyi 'byung 
127.7(1): gzhi 'di/ kun la khyab ste gang gi mthas ma reg /gzhi don rtogs dang ma rtogs 
127.8(1): khyad par las/ sangs rgyas sems can gnyis kyi 'byung gzhir gnas/ snang gsal 
127.9(1): dngos med mkha' la nyi shar bzhin/ sems kyi ngo bo cir yang ma grub ste/ 'char 
127.10(1): tshul ma 'gags cir yang gsal/ dper na nyi ma'i snying po las/ 'od zer phyogs 
127.11(1): med 'char ba bzhin/ rang rig 'od gsal chen po la/ 'od zer nyi ma'i zer 
127.12(1): ltar gsal/ gsal yang dran rtog cha phra bas/ yul dang yul can rtog 'dzin 
127.13(1): med/ dper na bar snang gzha' tshon bzhin/ sna tshogs gsal ba 'dzin med gnas/
127.14(1): 'khor 'das tha snyad ma grub cing / rtogs dang ma rtogs khyad par las/ 'khor 
127.15(1): 'das gnyis kyi 'byung gzhir gnas/ kun 'byung kun tu rgya ma chad/ 'byung bzhi'i 
127.16(1): snang ba ma grub pas/ rgyu yis ma bskyed rkyen gyis bshig tu med/ ngo bo ka dag 
128.1(1): 'char tshul lhun gyis grub/ sangs rgyas sgam pos mdzad du med/ bka' dang lung 
128.2(1): gi tha snyad med/ sems can sgrin pos bcos su med/ kun gzhi 'byung rung lung ma 
128.3(1): bstan/ nam mkha' rgya mtsho sa gzhi bzhin/ kun gyi 'byung gzhir gyur pas na/ kun 
128.4(1): gzhi'i ming du btags pa tsam/ tha snyad ma grub lung ma bstan/ de ltar gnas pa'i 
128.5(1): kun gzhi 'byung rung ste/ rtogs dang ma rtogs khyad par shin tu che/ dper na nam 
128.6(1): mkhar nyi ma'i 'od shar bas/ mun pa rang bzhin sangs pa bzhin/ rtogs pa'i rkyen 
128.7(1): dang 'phrad pa yis/ sangs rgyas sku dang zhing khams rnams/ btsal med lhun grub 
128.8(1): chen por shar/ ma rtogs pa yi sems can ni/ dper na mun khang sgron me shi ba 
128.9(1): bzhin/ ma rtogs rkyen dang 'phrad pa'i sems can gyi/ nyams su sdug bsngal 'khrul 
128.10(1): ba'i snang ba shar/ 'khor 'das gnyis su ming gi tha snyad byung / 'khor 'das gnyis 
128.11(1): kyi spyi gzhi bstan pa'i le'u ste dang po'o// //
128.12(1): 7 kun tu bzang po ma rig mun pa sangs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /gnyis pa 'khor 
128.13(1): 'das kyi gyes tshul 'di ltar snang / de dus kun tu bzang po yis/ dge ba til 'bru 
128.14(1): tsam yang ma byas te/ shes rig rnon po lhan cig skyes pa yis/ rang 'byung rig pa'i 
128.15(1): ye shes shar/ rig pa'i rtsal shar rang snang 'od/ phyogs med shar ba'i rang snang de/
128.16(1): rig pa'i rtsal snang yin par rtogs/ dper na nyi ma'i snying po la/ 'od zer rang 
128.17(1): bzhin lhun grub bzhin/ rang snang 'gag med shar ba'i snang tshul rnams/ rtsol med 
128.18(1): rang bzhin lhun gyis grub/ ji ltar mkhyen pa'i ye shes phyogs med rgyas/ thams cad 
128.19(1): rang snang du shes pa yis/ gzhan snang yin sems rtog pa med pas yul na mi med 
128.20(1): 'dra/ sems nyid skye med 'gag med rang sa zin/ sems dang sems 'byung 'khrul 
128.21(1): rtog ye nas dag /sku lnga rdzogs pa'i rdzogs sangs rgyas pa'o/ /thugs nyid spros bral 
129.1(1): wa
129.2(1): nam mkha' lta bu la/ yon tan kun rdzogs rdzogs pa'i sku ru bstan/ rdzogs sku 
129.3(1): nyi zer lta bu'i sprul sku mtha' yas 'byung / ma rtogs pa 
129.4(1): nyi ma'i snying po lta bu la/

129.6(1): rnams theg pa'i bye brag du mar phyes/ rang rang mos phyogs tshig gis don mtshon 
129.7(1): nas/ thabs mkhas thugs rjes rim dang rim gyis 'dren/ gong gi gnas lugs

129.9(1): gnyis pa'o//
129.10(1): 7 kun tu bzang po ma rig mtha' nas sel la phyag 'tshal lo/ /gsum pa

129.12(1): te/ khams gsum sems can gzhi yi steng nas 'khrul/ rang snang dwangs ma'i 
129.13(1): 'od lnga shar ba las/ dbang po rtul pos lhan skyes ma rig pas/ rang snang du ma 
129.14(1): shes gzhan snang yul du bzung / snyems byed rtog pa je che je rags pas/ sems 
129.15(1): dang sems 'byung log rtog shar ba yis/ rang snang 'od lnga gzhan snang yul du 
129.16(1): bzung / bzung bas snang ba 'od kyi mtha' ral nas/ 'od lnga me chu sa rlung nam 
129.17(1): mkhar rtog /ser po sar mthong ljang khu rlung du mthong / dmar po mer mthong sngon 
129.18(1): po chur yang mthong / dkar po nam mkhar rtog pa yi/ phyi'i 'khrul pa mtsho la dar 
129.19(1): chags bzhin/ ma rtogs 'khrul pa'i snang ba rang bzhin grub/ 'khrul snang yul la 
129.20(1): bden par bzung ba yis/ dwangs ma'i 'od lnga thig le las/ snyigs ma sgyu lus phung 
129.21(1): por grub/ bag chags lus po rnam smin dngos su smin/ dug gsum dug lnga nyi shu 
129.22(1): rtsa lnga sogs/ nyon mongs phra rags mi dge sna tshogs spyod/ dper na skom pas tsha chu 
129.23(1): 'thungs pa bzhin/ skye rga na 'chi'i sdug bsngal rnams/ sun pa med par sna tshogs 
130.1(1): spyod dgos pas/ rang snang ma rtogs 'khrul pa'i nyes skyon yin/ dper na mun khung 
130.2(1): sgron me shi ba bzhin/ ma rig mun pas 'thibs pa la/ rig pa'i ye shes 'char ba 
130.3(1): dka'/ ma rtogs bar du sdug bsngal sbyong ba ni/ spyi gzhi'i gnas lugs ma rtogs 
130.4(1): nyes skyon yin/ gnas lugs ma rtogs nas 'khrul lugs bstan pa'i le'u ste gsum 
130.5(1): pa'o// //
130.6(1): 7 kha) kun tu bzang po gnas lugs gsal bar ston la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bzhi 
130.7(1): pa ngo sprod lam gyi rim pa 'di ltar bstan/ theg pa rim dgu brgyad khri bzhi stong 
130.8(1): dang / sgo bzhi mdzod lnga phyi nang gsang gsum dang / de ltar lam gyi rim pa ci 
130.9(1): bstan kyang / rab 'bring tha ma gsum du bstan pa yin/ spong lam bsgyur lam 
130.10(1): grol lam gsum du 'gyur/ dge drang gnyis ni spong lam rim pa yin/ rgyu 'bras 
130.11(1): theg pa bzhin du zhib tu brtsi/ sdig bcu spangs nas dge bcu dang du len/ bskal 
130.12(1): pa grangs med sbyangs nas sangs rgyas thob du re/ sems las ma gtogs sangs 
130.13(1): rgyas gzhan du tshol/ btsal bas mi rnyed sems min sangs rgyas med/ dka' sdug

130.15(1): gnas thob pa tsam/ rang sems rtogs na sangs rgyas rang nyid yin/ a dkar ye 
130.16(1): gshen man chod bsgyur lam yin/ phyi snod 'jig rten gzhal yas nang bcud lha ru 
130.17(1): bsgyur/ nyon mongs dam rdzas bdud rtsi lnga ru bsgyur/ lta ba mkha' klong dbyings dang 
130.18(1): ye shes lha/ sgom pa bskyed rdzogs rten 'brel sgom/ spyod pa thabs shes rol par

130.21(1): ('on kyang lung bzhin byas na grub pa thob/)rnam rtog dri ma yin/ rang sems ye nas zhi khro'i 
131.1(1): dkyil 'khor yin/ de don rtogs na bsgrub bya'i yul ma grub/ spong lam pa bas 
131.2(1): sgyur lam khyad par 'phags/ / skye ba bdun nam gsum mam bar do tshun chad du/
131.3(1): bsgrub la brtson 'grus rab 'bring tha ma yis/gsang sngags rig 'dzin bde ba'i sa 
131.4(1): la 'khod/ 'dir ni lam rnams kun gyi mthar thug grol lam bstan/ 'khor 'das 
131.5(1): snang srid yod med rtag chad bde sdug rnams/ mi spang mi bsgrub 'dzin med rang 
131.6(1): sar grol/ nyon mongs bzung 'dzin chags sdang rang sar grol/ de'i phyir na grol 
131.7(1): lam zhes kyang bya/ 'dir yang gang zag dbang po'i khyad kyis gsum du bstan/ rim

131.12(1): 'bras bu la bzlas te le'u bzhi pa'o/ //

133.1(1): pa'i le'u ste drug pa'o// //
133.2(1): 7 kun tu bzang po rang rig mngon sangs rgyas la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bdun pa 
133.3(1): gang zag dbang po rab la gcig char du ngo sprad pa la/ gnas lugs gzhi don 
133.4(1): ye rdzogs bstan/ sngon sbyangs las 'phro dus 'dir sad/ rgyu 'bras bon gyis blo 
133.5(1): mi khengs/ gdams ngag rim gyis bstan mi dgos/ sems nyid bcos slad med 
133.6(1): pa la/ gang zag gis blo bcos mi bya bar/ gdod nas lhun grub chen por bstan/
133.7(1): sems nyid ngo bo skye 'gag med pa la/ 'char tshul ma nges 'khor 'das rol par 
133.8(1): shar/ shar ba de nyid thog tu ngo sprad de/ gang shar de nyid rang shar rang grol yin/
133.9(1): cir snang thams cad rang snang dngos med yin/ snang stong mnyam nyid ngang la ma 
133.10(1): bcos zhog /don la gtad med rang lugs lhug par zhog /'dzin med gtad med 
133.11(1): ngang la rang sar zhog /bzhag pas mi sdod dran rtog 'gyu ba'i dus/ gang shar ngos 
133.12(1): bzung rang bzhin med par thongs/ rang bzhin med pa de ka bon sku yin/ the tshom 
133.13(1): ma za rang bzhin lhug par zhog /de don ma bcos sangs rgyas dgongs pa yin/ ma 
133.14(1): 'gags 'khrul pa'i snang ba 'di/ dag snang sangs rgyas zhing du 'char/ thams cad 
133.15(1): rang snang min pa gzhan snang min/ snang la dngos med bar snang gzha' dang 'dra/
133.16(1): de don dpe yis mtshon te bstan pa ni/ nyi zla gza' skar mar me me long dang / dri 
133.17(1): med shel las sogs pa'i dpe rnams la/ rang snang 'od dang sku dang zhing khams 
133.18(1): rnams/ rang snang ma 'gags rtsal du 'char tshul bstan/ de ltar rtogs na snang

133.21(1): lta sgom dam tshig spyod 'bras mnyam rjes rnams/ mnyam pa chen po'i ngang du dbyer

134.6(1): 7 ga)kun tu bzang po ye shes zang thal sku la phyag 'tshal lo/ /brgyad pa 'bras

134.9(1): zag bcas dag pas 'di nyid nas/ grol bar kun tu bzang pos gsungs/ 'bring 
134.10(1): ni lus sems bral ba na/ gong gi gzhi snang chen por 'char ba de/ bon nyid 'od 
134.11(1): gsal bar do zer/ dang po spyi gzhi de nyid yin/ 'khor 'das bye brag 'byed dus 
134.12(1): yin/ 'od gsal ma bu de dus mjal/ da lta sbyangs pa'i yon tan gyis/ dmigs 
134.13(1): gtad blo yis sgom mi dgos/ rtogs dang grol ba dus mnyam 'byung / sangs rgyas
