445.14(1): kyis/ snang ba'i goms tshad mthar ru phyin par 'gyur/ zhes pa'i tshig bzhi po 'dis/
445.15(1): nyams len gyi grangs tshad bstan pa yin te dkyus gsal/ rig pa'i zer dang 
445.16(1): thugs rje'i nyag thag ni/ dang po ri gzar kha nas chu 'bab 'dra/ zhes pas/ dang 
445.17(1): po snang ba 'phel ba'i dus/ dar tsam yang mi chags par 'grim pa'o/ /gnyis pa chu 
445.18(1): bo klong du phebs pa 'dra/ zhes pas snang ba mched pa'i dus su/ snga ma las dal la 
445.19(1): g.yung bar snang ste/ zer dang nyag thag gnyis skya rkang gi tshul du mgyogs bul du 
445.20(1): snang ba'o/ /gsum pa bya khra gzan tshol lta bur 'gyur/ zhes pas/ snang ba rgyas pa'i 
445.21(1): dus su/ rig pa'i snying po thugs rje'i nyag thag de/ res 'ga' g.yo 'gul med pa 
446.1(1): gnas cing / res 'ga' 'grim pa'o/ /bzhi pa rul sbal mkhar gzhong tshud pa 'dra 
446.2(1): zhes pas/ snang ba rdzogs pa'i dus su/ thugs rje'i nyag thag de g.yo 'gul med 
446.3(1): par gnas pa'o/ /lnga pa 'byung bzhi zad pa'i nam mkha' 'dra/ zhes pas/ mthar 
446.4(1): thug gi snang ba shar ba'i dus su/ sgra 'od zer gsum byang chub sems su dmar thag 
446.5(1): chod pa'o/ /gsum pa mdor bsdus dkyus gsal/ gzer bu gnyis pa'i 'grel ba 
446.6(1): rdzogs so/ /
446.7(1): ga) gsum pa bon nyid dbyings kyi gzer bu la yang / don gsum las/ dang 
446.8(1): po ni/ kun tu bzang po khyab bdal phyogs ris med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas/
446.9(1): phyag 'tshal ba bstan te/ kun tu bzang po gong dang 'dra/ khyab bdal phyogs ris 
446.10(1): med pa ni/ byang chub kyi sems mtha' dbus phyogs mtshams phyi nang kha gting med 
446.11(1): par gnas pa'o/ /gnyis pa gzhung bkrol pa la/ khyab bdal chen po spyi la shar ba'i 
446.12(1): kun gzhi/ zhes pas/ sangs rgyas sems can 'khor ba myang 'das las sogs kun 
446.13(1): gyi spyi gzhi byang chub kyi sems la zer te/ de la bon nyid kyi dbyings zhes bya bar 
446.14(1): ming du btags te/ ci'i phyir btags na/ dbyings kyi mtshan nyid dgu shar nas 
446.15(1): zhes pas/ byang chub kyi sems de mu med par shar/ 'byams yas par shar/ yongs 
446.16(1): su rgya ma chad par shar/ kha gting med par shar/ dpag tu med par shar/ dog 
446.17(1): pa med par shar/ bdal pa chen por shar/ zad pa med par shar/ 'gyur ba 
446.18(1): med par shar/ de'i phyir na dbyings zhes bya'o/ /dpe ci dang 'dra na/ nam mkha' 
446.19(1): bzhin du ma phye mnyam pa chen por yongs la bdal/ zhes pas/ dbyings de sangs 
446.20(1): rgyas sems can yongs la bzang ngan che chung mtho dman bri gang nye ring med par 
446.21(1): gnas pa'o/ /gsum pa mdo bsdu ba dkyus su gsal/ gzer bu gsum pa'i 'grel 
447.1(1): ba rdzogs so/ /
447.2(1): nga) bzhi pa sems nyid ye shes kyi gzer bu la yang don gsum ste/ kun tu bzang 
447.3(1): po rang rig sgrib g.yogs med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas/ phyag 'tshal ba bstan 
447.4(1): te/ byang chub kyi sems ye shes rang shar du gnas pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis 
447.5(1): pa gzhung bkrol ba la/ lhan skyes rang la shar ba'i kun gzhi ni/ zhes pas/ sangs 
447.6(1): rgyas sems can so so'i rang rang gi rgyud la gnas pa'i rig pa'i ye shes la zer te/
447.7(1): de la sems nyid rig pa'i ye shes bya ba ming du btags/ ci'i phyir btags na/ ye 
447.8(1): shes kyi mtshan nyid lnga shar/ zhes pas/ stong zhing bdag med pas stong nyid kyi ye 
447.9(1): shes su shar/ gsal la rtog pa med pas me long ye shes su shar/ ma 'dres yongs su 
447.10(1): rdzogs pas so sor rtogs pa'i ye shes su shar/ ma phye mnyam par gnas pas mnyam 
447.11(1): nyid ye shes su shar/ ma rtsal lhun gyis grub pa'i bya grub ye shes su shar/ de'i phyir 
447.12(1): na ye shes zhes bya'o/ /dpe ci dang 'dra bar gnas na/ nyi ma bzhin du ma 'dres so 
447.13(1): sor shar la mnyam par gnas/ zhes pas/ gang zag gi rgyud la mtshan nyid so sor 
447.14(1): shar la/ gnas lugs bzang ngan che chung med par mnyam par gnas so/ /gsum 
447.15(1): pa mdor bsdus dkyus gsal/ gzer bu bzhi pa'i 'grel ba rdzogs so/ /
447.16(1): ca) lnga pa tshon gang bon sku'i gzer bu la yang / don gsum las/ dang po ni/
447.17(1): kun tu bzang po rang rig ka nas dag la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas/ phyag 'tshal 
447.18(1): ba bstan te/ shes rig rgyal po byang chub sems la gang gi yang mthas ma reg pa'i 
447.19(1): don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis pa gzhung bkrol ba la bzhi ste/ ye shes tshon gang gi ngo bo 
447.20(1): bstan pa dang / ye shes tshon gang gi gnas lugs bstan pa dang / ye shes tshon 
447.21(1): gang gi che ba bstan pa dang / ye shes tshon gang gi gtan tshigs bstan pa'o/ /dang 
448.1(1): po la gnyis te/ ye shes tshon gang dang 'od tshon gang bstan pa'o/ /dang po ni gsal 
448.2(1): ba rang 'byung rig pa'i rgyal po ni/ zhes pas/ gsal ba ni sgrib g.yogs med pa/
448.3(1): rang 'byung ni rgyu rkyen dang byed pa po med pa'o/ /rig pa ni dran rig thams cad kyi 
448.4(1): 'char gzhir gyur pa'o/ / rgyal po ni gong na med cing / shes rigs thams cad kyi 
448.5(1): mthar thug par gnas pa'o/ /de'i snga rol du rtogs pa'i ye shes dang / 'khrul pa'i 
448.6(1): ma rig pa ma grub pas ye shes tshon gang / de 'khor ba dang myang 'das su shar yang 
448.7(1): ma myong / 'o na ji ltar gnas zhe na/ rang 'byung ye shes kun gyi gzhi rtsar gnas/
448.8(1): zhes pas/ rgyu rkyen de rnams gang gis kyang ma byas par rang 'byung du ye nas gnas 
448.9(1): pa'o/ /gzugs med ye shes kha dog dbyibs gzugs bral/ brjod med ye shes ming 
448.10(1): tshig yi ger bral/ rtog med ye shes rtog dpyod blo dang bral/ zhes pa'i tshig gsum 
448.11(1): ni/ rang rig pa'i ye shes kyi gnas lugs de/ gzugs med pas dbyibs dang kha 
448.12(1): dog ma grub/ brjod du med pas ming tshig yi ge'i spyod yul las 'das/ rtog med 
448.13(1): ye shes blo las 'das pas rtog dpyod blo'i yul las 'das pa'o/ de la ye shes tshon 
448.14(1): gang snang med bon gyi sku bya bar yang ming du gdags/ gshen lha dkar po gdags 
448.15(1): med kun gyi gzhi/ zhes kyang bya/ ngo bo nyid kyi rig pa zhes kyang bya'o/ /gnyis pa 'od 
448.16(1): tshon gang gi ngo bo bstan pa ni/ gsal ba'i ye shes chen po tshon gang las/ snang ba'i 
448.17(1): 'od chen tshon gang rang bzhin shar/ zhes pas/ gang gi ye shes tshon gang gi 'char 
448.18(1): gzhi las/ snang ba'i 'od chen tshon gang ye nas rang shar du gnas te/ dper na 
448.19(1): nyi ma'i snying po las/ 'od rang shar du shar ba lta bu'o/ /ma 'dus mi 'bral nyid la 
448.20(1): nyid shar 'od/ ces pas/ ye shes tshon gang dang 'od tshon gang gnyis so sor gnas 
448.21(1): pa gcig tu 'dus pa ma yin/ gcig tu gnas pa so sor bral ba ma yin te/ rang 
449.1(1): la rang shar du ye nas gnas pa'o/ /gsal la dngos med snang la rang bzhin med/
449.2(1): ces pas 'od tshon gang de 'od du gsal yang dngos po dang mtshan mar ma grub 
449.3(1): par bstan pa'o/ /gzugs dang kha dog ris su chad pa med/ ces pas/ 'od tshon 
449.4(1): gang de sangs rgyas kyi sku dang sems can gyi lus las sogs gzugs thams cad kyi 
449.5(1): 'char gzhi yin la/ de ltar yin yang ngo bo gzugs gang du'ang ris su ma chad pa'o/
449.6(1): dkar ljang dmar sngo'i 'od las sogs te/ kha dog thams cad kyi 'char gzhi yin 
449.7(1): la/ de ltar yin yang ngo bo kha dog tu yang ris su ma chad pa'o/ /che chung chags 
449.8(1): tshad gzhal ba'i tshad las 'das/ zhes pas/ 'od tshon gang de che ba'i tshad bzung 
449.9(1): du med de/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin du mtha' dbus med par gnas so/ /chung ba'i 
449.10(1): tshad gzhal du med de/ 'jag mig gi srin bu'i lus la 'jug tu rung ba'o/ /'od 
449.11(1): tshon gang ba de la snang ba chen po bon gyi sku zhes kyang bya/ gshen lha dkar po bdag 
449.12(1): yod rtsa ba'i lha zhes kyang bya/ lhag mthong gi rig pa zhes kyang bya'o/ /gnyis pa ye 
449.13(1): shes tshon gang gi gnas lugs ni/ tshon gang sku la rang rig spyan shar bas/ zhes 
449.14(1): pas/ 'od tshon gang la 'gyur ba med pas sku zhes bya/ ye shes tshon gang la sgrib 
449.15(1): g.yogs med pas spyan shar zhes bya/ de gnyis dbye ru med pas sku dang ye shes 
449.16(1): gnyis med ces bya/ phyogs bcu yongs gzigs mdun rgyab med pa'i sku/ zhes pas/
449.17(1): sku dang ye shes tshon gang de/ ye shes kyi zhal la mdun rgyab med de/ shel sgong bzhin 
449.18(1): du phyogs bcur gsal ba'o/ /ma bltas kun mthong sgrib g.yogs med pa'i spyan/
449.19(1): zhes pas/ rig pa'i spyan la sgrib pa med pas/ me long g.ya' dag bzhin du bltas 
449.20(1): pa med par gsal ba'o/ /phyi dang nang med zang thal chen por shar/ zhes pas/ ye 
449.21(1): shes tshon gang de phyi na gnas la nang na mi gnas pa'am/ na nang na gnas la phyi

455.1(1): 'brel gong bzhin no//sku dang ye shes zung 'brel rdzogs pa chen po'i mdzod/ ces 
455.2(1): pas/ snang ba gsum la sku zhes bya ste/ ji snyed sku yi rnam sprul thams cad de las 
455.3(1): shar ba'o/ /rig pa la ye shes zhes bya ste/ mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi rnam sprul thams 
455.4(1): cad de las shar ba'o/ /zung 'brel gong bzhin no/ /lha dang gzhal yas zung 'brel 
455.5(1): rdzogs pa chen po'i mdzod/ ces pas/ snang ba gsum la gzhal yas zhes bya ste/ phyi 
455.6(1): nang gsang ba'i dkyil 'khor thams cad de las shar ba'o/ /rig pa'i ye shes la/
455.7(1): gshen lha dkar po rtsa ba'i lha zhes bya ste/ phyi nang gsang ba'i lha tshogs dang / phrin 
455.8(1): las rnam bzhi'i lha tshogs thams cad de las shar ba'o/ /de gnyis dbye yis mi phyed 
455.9(1): pas zung 'brel/ ma lus rdzogs pas rdzogs pa/ tshad las 'das pas chen po/ kun 
455.10(1): 'byung bas mdzod/ gsum pa mdor bsdu dkyus gsal/ gzer bu drug pa'i 'grel 
455.11(1): ba rdzogs so/ /
455.12(1): bdun pa phyogs med sprul sku'i gzer bu la yang / don gsum las/ kun tu 
455.13(1): bzang po rang rig sprul pa'i sku la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas/ phyag 'tshal ba bstan 
455.14(1): te/ byang chub sems kyi cho 'phrul cir yang 'char zhing / kun gyi byed pa po yin pa'i 
455.15(1): don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis pa gzhung bkrol ba la gnyis te/ mdor bstan pa dang /
455.16(1): rgyas par bshad pa'o/ /dang po ni snang ba'i yul dang rig pa'i ye shes gnyis/ ma 
455.17(1): phye ma 'dres zung du 'brel ba'i rtsal zhes pas/ yul sgra 'od zer gsum dang / yul 
455.18(1): can rig pa'i ye shes gnyis/ / dbyer med zung du 'brel ba'i rtsal las/ 'khor 
455.19(1): 'das kyi cho 'phrul ma lus pa shar te/ gang shar na/ snang grags blo'i bye brag ma lus 
455.20(1): shar/ ces pas/ gong du rdzogs sku'i skabs su bshad pa bzhin no/ /'od dang rig 
455.21(1): pa'i rtsal las/ 'khor ba dang myang 'das kyi snang ba sna tshogs shar/ sgra dang rig 
456.1(1): pa'i rtsal las/ sangs rgyas kyi gsung dang sems can ngag gi bye brag ma lus shar/
456.2(1): zer dang rig pa'i rtsal las/ sangs rgyas mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang / sems can blo'i 
456.3(1): bye brag ma lus shar/ gnyis pa rgyas par bshad pa ni/ tshogs drug yul drug 'brel 
456.4(1): ba'i dbang po drug ces pas/ byang chub sems kyi cho 'phrul las/ mig gi rnam shes 
456.5(1): rna ba'i rnam shes las sogs/ nang rnam shes tshogs drug gi snang ba shar/ gzugs 
456.6(1): sgra dri ro reg las sogs te/ phyi yul drug gi snang ba shar/ mig gi dbang po rna ba'i 
456.7(1): dbang po las sogs te/ bar lus sems 'brel ba'i dbang po drug tu shar/ 'khor 
456.8(1): dang myang 'das sna tshogs phyogs med sprul zhes pas/ de ltar tshogs drug yul drug 
456.9(1): dbang po drug gi rtsal las/ ma rtogs pa'i dus na/ 'khor ba'i cho 'phrul sna tshogs 
456.10(1): phyogs med du sprul/ rtogs pa'i dus na/ mya ngan las 'das pa'i cho 'phrul sna 
456.11(1): tshogs phyogs med du sprul lo/ /byed pa med par rang 'byung rtsal du shar/ ces pas/
456.12(1): de ltar byang chub sems las 'khor 'das kyi cho 'phrul shar ba de ched du byas pa ma 
456.13(1): yin te/ rang 'byung rang shar du shar ba'o/ /snang ba'i dbyings la zad cing bri ba 
456.14(1): med/ rig pa'i mkha' la gsal dang 'grib pa med/ ces pas byang chub kyi sems 
456.15(1): la 'khor 'das kyi cho 'phrul ji snyed cig shar yang / snang ba chen po gsum la rdul 
456.16(1): tsam yang zad cing bri ba med la/ rig pa'i ye shes la skad tsam yang gsal dang 
456.17(1): 'grib pa med do/ /rang 'byung rang grol thig le gcig la rdzogs/ zhes pas/ 'khor 
456.18(1): 'das kyi cho 'phrul ji snyed cig shar yang / gzhan nas 'byung zhing gzhan du 'gro ba 
456.19(1): ma yin te/ byung yang sems kyi klong nas byung la/ grol yang sems kyi klong na rang 
456.20(1): grol te/ sems thig le nyag gcig la thams cad rdzogs pa'o/ /gsum pa mdor 
456.21(1): sdus dkyus gsal/ gzer bu bdun pa'i 'grel ba rdzogs so/
457.1(1): cha)brgyad pa mtshon byed dpe'i gzer bu la yang / don gsum las dang po ni/
457.2(1): kun tu bzang po the tshom mun pa sel la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas phyag 'tshal ba 
457.3(1): bstan te/ byang chub kyi sems ngo shes thag chod gdeng dang ldan na/ the tshom gyi mun 
457.4(1): pa rang sangs pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis pa gzhung gi don la lnga ste/ snang ba'i 
457.5(1): yul dang / rig pa'i ye shes zung du 'brel ba'i dpe bstan pa dang / dus bzhi la 
457.6(1): grol 'khrul gyi tshul bstan pa dang / rgyu dang gsal dang 'grib tshul bstan pa dang /
457.7(1): dus kyi tshad bstan pa dang / 'khrul pa zlog pa'i thabs bstan pa'o/ /dang po ni yul 
457.8(1): dang rig pa zung 'brel mtshon pa'i dpe/ chu shel nyi ma mar me 'od kyi tshul/ zhes 
457.9(1): pas/ rig pa ni chu dang 'dra la/ sgra 'od zer gsum gyi snang ba gsum ni/ chu 'od 
457.10(1): kyi tshul lo/ /rig pa ni shel dang 'dra la/ snang ba gsum ni shel gyi 'od lta bu'o/ /
457.11(1): rig pa ni nyi ma dang 'dra la/ snang ba gsum ni nyi 'od dang 'dra'o/ /rig pa ni mar 
457.12(1): me dang 'dra la/ snang ba gsum ni mar me'i 'od kyi tshul lo/ /gnyis pa dus bzhi la 
457.13(1): gsal dang 'grib tshul bstan pa ni/ gnas dang 'du 'bral 'khrul dang dus bzhi 
457.14(1): la zhes pas/ gnas pa ni gzhi ye nas gnas pa'i dus so/ /'du ba ni da lta lus 
457.15(1): sems 'brel ba'i dus so/ /'bral ba ni lus sems so sor bral nas bon nyid 'od 
457.16(1): gsal gyi bar do shar ba'i dus so/ /'khrul pa ni srid pa'i bar do la 'khyams pa'i 
457.17(1): dus so/ /sgrib med sgrib bcas gsal dang 'grib pa'i tshul ces pas/ gzhi ye nas 
457.18(1): gnas pa'i dus na/ sprin med mkha' la nyi shar bzhin/ sgra 'od zer gsum sgrib 
457.19(1): med du gnas/ da lta lus sems 'brel ba'i dus ni/ bum pa nang gi mar me bzhin/
457.20(1): lus kyis bsgribs nas sgrib bcas su gnas/ lus sems bral nas 'od gsal gyi 
457.21(1): bar do shar ba'i dus su/ sprin bral gyi nyi ma bzhin/ bar der lan cig gsal bar 
458.1(1): shar/ srid pa'i bar do la 'khrul ba'i dus su/ nyi ma sprin gyis g.yogs pa bzhin/
458.2(1): 'khrul pa'i snang bas 'grib par 'gyur ro/ /gsum pa grol 'khrul gyi tshul bstan pa 
458.3(1): ni/ nyid la nyid mthong sangs rgyas 'di yis grol zhes pa/ kun tu bzang pos sgra 
458.4(1): 'od zer gsum rang snang la rang snang du shes pas/ slob pa'i slob dpon med par 
458.5(1): ye nas sangs rgyas/ snang ba dbang thob rang dbang 'khor lo bsgyur/ zhes pas/
458.6(1): kun tu bzang pos snang ba rang snang du shes pas/ snang ba'i rjes su ma 'breng /
458.7(1): rjes su ma 'breng pas snang ba la rang dbang thob/ rang dbang thob pas snang ba ji 
458.8(1): ltar bsgyur bsgyur du btub ste/ dper na rgyal pos rmangs la dbang bsgyur ba dang 
458.9(1): 'dra/ rang la gzhan mthong sems can 'di yis 'khrul/ zhes pas/ khams gsum 
458.10(1): gyi sems can gyis sgra 'od zer gsum rang snang du ma shes pha rol na snang ba rang 
458.11(1): rgyud pa zhig yod par mthong bas/ log par 'khrid mkhan med kyang 'khor bar 
458.12(1): 'khyams pa'o/ /snang ba'i rjes 'breng gzhan snang sgyu mas bslus zhes pas/ khams 
458.13(1): gsum sems can gyis snang ba gzhan snang du mthong bas snang ba'i rjes su 'breng /
458.14(1): snang ba'i rjes su 'breng bas rig pa rang dbang shor/ rang dbang shor bas snang 
458.15(1): ba gzhan snang du gyur te/ dper na rgyal po dmangs su 'khyams pa'am/ byis pas 
458.16(1): gzha' tshon ded pa dang 'dra/ bzhi pa rgyu dang dus kyi tshad bstan pa ni/ las kyi rgyu 
458.17(1): med rang bzhin shugs las byung / zhes pas/ kun tu bzang po slob dpon med 
458.18(1): par sangs rgyas pa dang / khams gsum sems can log par khrid mkhan med par 
458.19(1): 'khor bar 'khyams pa gnyis/ dge sdig rgyu 'bras ji lta bu zhig sngon du song ba yin 
458.20(1): zhe na/ dge sdig rgyu 'bras song ba ma yin te/ gnas lugs rang shugs kyi rtsal 
458.21(1): las byung ba yin te/ dper na me lce gyen la 'gro ba dang / chu lce thur du 'gro ba la 
459.1(1): skyes bus byed pa med pa bzhin no/ /dus kyis tshad med thog mtha' med nas shar 
459.2(1): ces pas/ kun tu bzang pos rtogs pa dang / khams gsum sems can 'khrul pa 
459.3(1): gnyis/ dus ci tsam na yin zhe na/ dus kyi tshad med de/ dus gsum thog dang tha 
459.4(1): ma med nas shar zhes bya'o/ /lnga pa 'khrul pa zlog pa'i thabs bstan pa ni/ 'khrul 
459.5(1): med snying po thag bcad 'khrul mi srid ces pas/ ka dag rig pa'i gnas lugs ngo 
459.6(1): shes shing thag chod par byas na/ 'khrul mi srid de/ dper na rgyal bus rgyal sa zin 
459.7(1): pa dang 'dra'o/ /snang ba'i phugs bcad snang bas bslu mi 'gyur/ zhes pas/ 'khrul 
459.8(1): rkyen sgra 'od zer gsum gyi snang ba phugs bcad nas rang snang du ngo shes par byas 
459.9(1): na/ snang ba de gsum gyis bslu bar mi 'gyur te/ dper na sgyu ma la sgyu mar shes na/
459.10(1): sgyu mas mi bslu ba'am/ gzha' tshon la rang bzhin med par shes na/ gzha' tshon gyi 
459.11(1): rjes mi 'ded pa dang 'dra'o/ /gsum pa mdor bsdu dkyus gsal/ gzer bu brgyad 
459.12(1): pa'i 'grel ba rdzogs so/ /
459.13(1): ja)dgu pa rang rig khong shar gyi gzer bu la yang don gsum las/ kun tu 
459.14(1): bzang po rang rig 'du 'bral med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas phyag 'tshal ba 
459.15(1): bstan te/ byang chub kyi sems gang nas ma 'ongs pas 'dus pa med/ gang du mi 
459.16(1): 'gro bas 'bral ba med/ dus gsum lhan cig skyes pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis 
459.17(1): pa gzhung gi don la/ rang rig ye shes gab cig sbas/ zhes pas/ rang rig pa'i ye 
459.18(1): shes de rtogs par dka' bas gab/ sgrib pas bsgribs pas sbas/ zhes bya'o/ /gang 
459.19(1): du gab na/ gnas pa gzhi yi tsi ta ni/ nam mkha'i dbyings dang rgya mtsho 'dra/ zhes

459.21(1): 'dra ba'i dbyings su/ rig pa'i ye shes nyin mo'i skar ma dang 'dra bar gab/ kun

460.2(1): 'dra bar gab bo/ /snang ba'i 'od kyi tsi ta ni/ gzha' tshon sna lnga'i gur phub 'dra/
460.3(1): zhes pas/ 'od lnga'i gur khang la zer te/ rig pa'i ye shes 'od lnga'i sbubs su/ rang 
460.4(1): 'od kyis rang sgrib ste sbas/ gdos pa sha'i tsi ta ni/ 'phra men rin chen bum pa 'dra/
460.5(1): zhes pas/ snying mchong gur smug po la zer te/ rig pa'i ye shes de snying mchong gur 
460.6(1): gyi dbus na bum pa nang gi mar me bzhin du sbas pa'o/ /gsal ba'i ye shes tshon 
460.7(1): gang ni/ bum pa nang gi mar me 'dra zhes pas/ rang rig pa'i ye shes khong nas shar

460.9(1): 'dra zhes pas ni/ snang ba chen po gsum rig pa'i ye shes la rang shar ba'i dpe 
460.10(1): bstan pa'o/ /rig pa'i rgyal po khong nas shar zhes pas/ rang rig khong nas shar 
460.11(1): ba'i don bstan pa'o/ /gang gi khong nas shar na/ kun gzhi stong pa'i klong nas shar/

460.13(1): ta'i dbus nas rang shar/ zhes pas/ phyi ltar tsi ta'i dbus nas rang shar/ nang 
460.14(1): ltar 'od lnga'i sbubs nas rang shar/ gsang ba ltar kun gzhi'i klong nas rang shar 
460.15(1): ba'o/ /kun 'byung rnam dag nam mkha'i mdzod/ ces pas/ kun gzhi dang rig pa'i 
460.16(1): yon tan bstan te/ kun 'byung ba ni 'khor 'das kyi bon ma lus 'byung ba'o/ /
460.17(1): rnam dag ni gang gi'ang dri ma med pa'o/ /nam mkha'i mdzod ni ci snyed 'byung yang 
460.18(1): zad pa med pa'o/ /rim pa du mas sbags te sgrib ces pas/ kun gzhi dang rig pa 
460.19(1): ngos mi zin pa'i skyon bstan te/ ci'i phyir ngos mi zin na/ phyi ltar lus kyis bsgribs 
460.20(1): nas ngos mi zin te/ bum pa nang gi mar me dang 'dra/ nang ltar yul drug gi snang 
460.21(1): bas bsgribs nas ngos mi zin te/ nyin mo'i skar ma dang 'dra/ gsang ba ltar blo'i 
461.1(1): bag chags kyis bsgribs nas ngos mi zin te/ nyi ma sprin gyis bsgribs pa dang 
461.2(1): 'dra'o/ /sgo mo med na mthong mi 'gyur zhes pas/ de ltar kun gzhi dang rig pa de 
461.3(1): sgrib pa'i rim pa de rnams kyis sbags te bsgribs pa la/ phyi ltar gdams ngag gi sgo 
461.4(1): med na/ bon nyid kyi phugs mi mthong / nang ltar sgron ma'i sgo med na/ sgra 'od zer 
461.5(1): gsum gyi phugs mi mthong / gsang ba ltar rig pa'i sgo med na/ kun gzhi'i phugs 
461.6(1): mi mthong / mdzod sgo phye la mdzod phugs bstan zhes pas/ kun gzhi dang rig pa 
461.7(1): ngos zin par bya ba'i don du/ phyi ltar gdams ngag gi mdzod sgo phye la/ bon nyid 
461.8(1): kyi mdzod phugs bstan/ nang ltar sgron ma'i mdzod sgo phye la/ sgra 'od zer gsum gyi 
461.9(1): mdzod phugs bstan/ gsang ba ltar rig pa'i ye shes kyi mdzod sgo phye la/ kun gzhi

461.11(1): dgu pa'i 'grel pa rdzogs so/ /

461.13(1): tu bzang po rang rig yo gal med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /zhes pas phyag 'tshal ba 
461.14(1): ston te/ byang chub kyi sems gnyug ma bcos slad med pa'i don rtogs na/ lam 
461.15(1): la gol ba med pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /gnyis pa gzhung la gsum ste/ 'od lnga dang 
461.16(1): 'byung ba lnga yis lus sems bskyed tshul bstan pa dang / rig pa rtsa'i lam la shar

461.18(1): rig pa'i ye shes tshon gang las/ snang ba'i 'od mdangs rnam lnga shar te/ de las

462.2(1): rlung 'od me 'od chu 'od sa 'od lngas lus sems kyi go phyes/ mkha' rdul rlung rdul 
462.3(1): me rdul chu rdul sa rdul rnam pa lngas lus sems kyi rten byas shing yongs su bskyed

462.15(1): las 'das pa'i lam sgor shar/ rtsa de las rig pa 'phos na/ mya ngan las 'das

462.18(1): 'phos na/ 'khor ba'i gnas su 'khyams/ g.yas nas shar ba skyon gyi lam zhes

463.2(1): rgyu bas/ g.yon gyi rtsa sgo gang las 'phos kyang yon tan shas che bar skye/ sgo gsum 
463.3(1): khams gsum 'khor ba'i lam zhes pas/ lus ngag yid gsum ste/ de gsum gang 
463.4(1): las 'phos kyang khams gsum du skye/ sgo bzhir shar ba skye bzhi'i lam/ zhes pas 
463.5(1): yan lag rnam pa bzhi ste/ de bzhi gang las 'phos kyang / skye ba rnam bzhir 'khor 
463.6(1): ro/ /sgo lnga shar ba rgyud lnga'i lam zhes pas/ dbang po sgo lnga ste/ de lnga gang las rig

463.9(1): yon gnyis med kyi lam bstan pa ni/ dbu ma 'khor 'das gnyis med lam zhes 
463.10(1): pas/ rtsa dbu ma la skyon yon gyi dri ma gang yang med pas/ rig pa ka dag chen por 
463.11(1): shar ba'o/ /rig pa'i rgyal po lam las shar zhes pas/ rang rig yo gal med pa'i 
463.12(1): don bstan pa'o/ /lam gang las shar zhe na/ kun gzhi stong pa'i dbyings las shar/
463.13(1): snang ba 'od kyi sbubs las shar/ dbu ma byang chub rgyud las shar/ zhes pas/ phyi 
463.14(1): ltar rtsa dbu ma'i lam las shar/ nang ltar 'od lnga'i sbubs las shar/ gsang ba 
463.15(1): ltar kun gzhi'i dbyings las yo gal med par shar ba'o/ /rig pa lam la ji ltar

464.1(1): ma la 'khor ba'i lam sgo gtan nas med pas/ lam 'di las 'phos na 'khor bar 
464.2(1): skye mi srid pas/ rnal 'byor gyi rig pa 'di la 'pho bar bya'o/ /ci ltar 'pho zhe na/
464.3(1): rig pa sems kyi mi pho de/ dran pa yid kyi rta la zhon/ thogs med rlung gi gshog 
464.4(1): pas skyod/ dbu ma byang chub lam las gshegs/ spyi gtsug bde ba'i gsang sgor 
464.5(1): byon/ ces pas/ rig pa mi yin/ yid rta yin/ rlung gshog pa'am lcag yin/ dbu 
464.6(1): ma lam yin/ spyi gtsug sgo yin pas/ des na sems kyi mi pho de/ yid kyi rta la zhon/
464.7(1): rlung gi lcag gis skyod/ dbu ma'i lam la gshegs/ tshangs pa'i bu gar 'pho ba'o/ /
464.8(1): gnyis pa 'pho ba'i yon tan ni/ rig pa'i rgyal po gcer bu shar zhes pas/ rtsa dbu 
464.9(1): ma'i lam la nyon mongs dang rnam rtog rgyu ba'i go skabs med pas/ sgo de las 'phos 
464.10(1): na/ rig pa sgrib g.yogs med pa rjen gcer du 'char ba'o/ /rnam rtog blo yi g.yang 
464.11(1): lugs bud/ ces pas/ nyon mongs pa dang rnam rtog spang pa med pa rang dag

503.18(1): bar chad kyi rtags yin pas/ de la lus skyes bu'i brkyang thabs bya/ ngag tu e'i 
503.19(1): rnam pa bzlas/ sems kyis lha sku dpag tu med pa bsgom mo/ /yang rten 'brel zab 
503.20(1): mo dang gsang sngags la ma brten par byin brlabs 'byung ba yang yod de/ de la 
503.21(1): lta sgom dang rgyud lung gi tshig rnams rang brdol du 'byung ba yin/ de la lus stag 
504.1(1): mo mchongs pa ltar bya/ ngag tu i'i rnam pa bzlas/ sems ni snying gi dkyil du sbas 
504.2(1): te sgom par bya'o/ /yang na 'byung ba bzhi'i sgra don la ma bslabs par/ mi ma yin 
504.3(1): gyi gzugs sna tshogs mthong zhing de'i brda' skad go ba 'byung ste/ de dag la lus 
504.4(1): ni 'dab chags lding ba ltar bya/ ngag tu u'i rnam pa bzlas/ sems kyis phyi nang 
504.5(1): thams cad stong pa nyid du sgom par bya'o/ /yang mkha' 'gro las sogs cha byad kyis 
504.6(1): lung ston pa dang / bon gsungs pa dang / skabs su 'ong zhing skabs su mi snang 
504.7(1): zhing / gzugs de gcig char du snang zhing rtag tu spyod yul du snang ba la ni/ lus 
504.8(1): khro bo'i 'gying stabs su bya zhing / ngag tu hri'i yi ge bzlas/ sems kyi lha'i spro bsdu 
504.9(1): bya zhing / de nyid bsgom par bya'o/ /de lta bu la man ngag de ltar ma byas na/ bdud 
504.10(1): kyis bslu zhing khyad par du yi dwags kyi skye gnas su 'gyur ro/ /de rnams theg pa 
504.11(1): thun mong pa rnams la 'ong zhing / snyan rgyud zab mo'i don sgom pa rnams la ni 'ong 
504.12(1): bar mi 'gyur ro/ /
504.13(1): 7 mi 'gyur ba'i rtags la gsum ste/ gzhan gyis mthong ba dang / rang gis 
504.14(1): mthong ba dang / rang gzhan gnyis kas mthong ba'o/ /gzhan gyis mthong ba ni/
504.15(1): mngon sum gyis gnad gzir ba tsam gyis 'byung ste/ lus snum zhing skra dkar dang 
504.16(1): gnyer ma med pa dang / skra dang sen mo skye ba med cing / lus la srog chags shig 
504.17(1): mi skye ba dang / rab tu mgyogs shing lus la sangs rgyas kyi phyag mtshan gyi rtags 
504.18(1): yod pa dang / nam mkha' la 'phur zhing chu la bying ba med pa dang / ri brag rnams 
504.19(1): la zang thal du 'byung zhing / 'byung bas mi tshugs pa rnams so/ /rang gis mthong 
504.20(1): ba ni/ lus shing bal gyi 'dab bas yang ba dang / de nas zhag lnga ni/ dbugs rgyu 
504.21(1): ba mi tshor ba dang / de nas zhag bcu gcig na/ dngos po gang la bltas pa thams 
505.1(1): cad 'ju bar nus pa dang / de nas nyi shu rtsa gcig na/ rang gi lus zang thal du 
505.2(1): mthong bar 'gyur ro/ /rang gzhan gnyis kas mthong ba ni/ yid la ci ltar 'gyus 
505.3(1): pa'i rten 'brel gyis/ pha rol gyi nad la phan nus pa dang / lus la sha mtshan ngo 
505.4(1): mtshar can 'byung ba dang / chu la bying pa med pa rnams yin/ phyi rtags 'di rnams 
505.5(1): ni bshad pa mang yang / phal cher nges pa med pa yin no/ /gzhan gyis mthong pa'i 
505.6(1): ngag gi rtags ni/ tshig ci smras thams cad gzhan la phan pa dang / 'khrul pa'i tshig 
505.7(1): mi 'byung ba dang / de nas yun 'ga' na lkugs pa lta bur 'gyur ba dang / de nas 
505.8(1): yun 'ga' na lta sgom dang rgyud lung gi tshig rnams rang brdol du 'byung ngo / /rang 
505.9(1): gis tshor ba ni/ gdams rgyud sna tshogs shes pa dang / de nas zhag dgu nas/ sgra 
505.10(1): mi mthun pa sna tshogs sgrog shes pa dang / de nas zla ba phyed nas/ grub mtha'i tshig 
505.11(1): sna tshogs shes pa dang / de nas zhag bcu gcig nas lta sgom gyi tshig rnams shes 
505.12(1): pa dang / de nas nyi shu rtsa gcig na/ lha las sogs pa'i rigs drug gi skad shes 
505.13(1): pa dang / de nas zla ba phyed na/ bem po'i skad rnams shes pa dang / de nas zhag 
505.14(1): bdun na/ sangs rgyas dang sems dpa'i gsung rnams rim par shes pa ni/ ngag gi 
505.15(1): grub rtags so/ /rang gzhan gnyis kas mthong ba'i sems kyi rtags ni/ chu la bying 
505.16(1): ba med pa dang / nam mkha' la bya bzhin 'phur ba ni/ sems rtags lus la shar 
505.17(1): ba yin no/ /rang gis tshor pa ni/ snying rje chen po rgyun du skye ba dang / de nas zla ba 
505.18(1): gcig nas/ gang du bsam pa'i yul du phyin pa dang / de nas zla ba drug nas mngon 
505.19(1): shes drug 'char ba ni/ sems rtags lus la shar ba yin no/ /de ni phyi rtags yin 
505.20(1): te rgyun du gnas pa ma yin/ gcig nub cing gcig 'char ba yin no/ /gzhan yang 
505.21(1): gos dang zas mi dgos pa dang / mnyam bzhag la zhag dang zla ba'i bar du gnas 
506.1(1): pa dang / rlung gar 'dod sar 'drongs pa dang / de rnams ni don gyi tha ma yin te/
506.2(1): sangs rgyas pa la rdul tsam yang phan pa med do/ !
506.3(1): 7 yang dag pa'i rtags mchog tu gyur pa ni/ nyams su blangs pa'i dngos gzhi 
506.4(1): yi/ rtags rang gis mthong zhing gzhan gyis mi mthong ba ni/ 'di dag ste/ de yang 
506.5(1): lus kyi gnad ma gzir na/ sku gsum gyi snang ba lam du mi 'char bas/ lus kyi 
506.6(1): gnad rab tu gces/ de yang mig gi gzigs stangs ma gzir na/ snang ba gong du 
506.7(1): mi 'phel bas/ mig gi lta stangs gal che'o/ /de ltar byas pa'i skyes bu la/ 'di dag 
506.8(1): rnams lam du snang ba yin te/ nyams su blangs pa'i dngos gzhi la zhugs nas/
506.9(1): dbang po rab zla ba phyed/ 'bring zla ba gsum/ tha ma zla ba bcu na/ thig le stong 
506.10(1): pa'i sgron ma nyid/ skyes bu'i mtheb mdzub kyis rtsol bas ma byas par rang snang ba 
506.11(1): yin no/ /de yang res snang res mi snang ba yin no/ /de ni rdzogs pa chen po rtsol sgrub 
506.12(1): dang bral ba'i tshad yin te/ 'di'i dus la bar chad nas tshe'i dus byas kyang / skye ba 
506.13(1): gnyis brgyud pa'i tha ma la/ 'di dang 'phrad nas sangs rgyas pa la the tshom med do/ /
506.14(1): de nas zla ba bdun dang dgu dang bcu gcig na/ dbyings rnam par dag pa'i sgron 
506.15(1): ma bya ba/ rang gi smin mtshams nas bral nas snang ba yin te/ de yang nam mkha' 
506.16(1): dngas pa la nyi ma'i phyogs tsam la gtad de nyams su blangs pas/ thog mar dkar 
506.17(1): po lang ling las/ 'od lnga snang ba dum bur 'char ba yin no/ /de 'khor 'das rgyab 
506.18(1): gyes pa'i tshad yin te/ 'di'i dus na bar chad kyang / mngal gyi grong khyer du 'jug 
506.19(1): mi srid de/ rang bzhin sprul pa sku'i zhing khams su rdzus nas skye te/ lo lnga brgya nas 
506.20(1): sangs rgya'o/ /de nas dbang po'i khyad par gyis/ zhag gsum mam lnga'am bdun na/
506.21(1): 'od lnga'i snang ba gyen la 'breng pa dang / rtsibs la shar ba dang / mdung rtse'i rnam 
507.1(1): pa lta bu dang / re lde'i rnam pa tsam du snang ba yin no/ /de ni dbyings la rig pa 
507.2(1): 'dus pa'i tshad yin te/ 'di la bar chad kyang bar do la sangs rgya'o/ /de nas zhag 
507.3(1): dgu dang zla ba phyed dang nyi shu rtsa gcig na/ dbyings de nyid kyang kha dog sna tshogs 
507.4(1): su snang ba yin no/ /de yang snang ba sna tshogs su snang ste/ 'di nyid bar do gsum pa 
507.5(1): lhun grub kyi snang ba la sangs rgya'o/ /dbyings kyi snang ba de la/ rin po che'i drwa ba 
507.6(1): dang / drwa ba drwa phyed dang / mig mang ris dang / yig tshogs kyi rnam pa lta bu dang /
507.7(1): mchod rten dang / lcags kyu dang mdung rtse dang / nya mig lta bu shar ba'i dus na/
507.8(1): dbyings kyi rgyan rdzogs pa'i tshad yin te/ srid pa'i bar do la rang log pa zhes bya 
507.9(1): ste/ 'di la bar chad kyang / de ma thag tu bar do med par sangs rgya'o/ /de nas zla 
507.10(1): ba dgu dang bcu dang bco lnga/ bco brgyad na/ dbyings kyi snang ba mthong ma thag 
507.11(1): tu/ dkar po lang ling dang / ban bun dang las sogs yul gru tsam du snang ba 
507.12(1): yin no/ /de la brtag pas kha dog gsal ba'i 'od lngas/ rang gnas pa'i lung pa 
507.13(1): de nyid/ rang mi snang ba tsam du shar ba'i dus na/ sems bem po'i 'khrul pa rnams 
507.14(1): dang bral ba'i tshad yin te/ 'di la bar do med par sangs rgya'o/ /de nas zhag bco 
507.15(1): brgyad dang / nyi shu rtsa gcig dang / sum cu rtsa gnyis na/ dbyings dang rig pa la 
507.16(1): nyin mo dang mtshan mo med par/ dus thams cad du snang ba yin no/ /de dag ni 
507.17(1): dbyings kyi ye shes 'phel ba yin no/ /dbyings dang rig pa la nyin mtshan med pa 
507.18(1): ni/ 'khor 'das gnyis su med pa zhes bya ste/ de yang mtshan mo 'khor ba'i cha/
507.19(1): nyin mo myang 'das kyi cha yin pas/ mtshan mo'i snang ba nub pa'i tshad kyis/ bar 
507.20(1): chad kyang bar do mi 'byung zhing / bar ma chad na lo lnga nas phung po lhag ma med 
507.21(1): par sangs rgya'o/ /de nas zla ba gsum dang drug dang bcu gnyis na/ snang ba thams 
508.1(1): cad thig ler snang ba/ snying po bcud du 'dril ba yin te/ nyungs 'bru tsam mam/
508.2(1): sran ma'i rdog po tsam du snang ba ste/ 'gro 'ong du snang ba yin no/ /de lta bu'i tshe na 
508.3(1): phyi'i lus ngag kyang 'di lta bu'i rtags dang ldan no/ /bya ba gzhan la 'jug snying mi 
508.4(1): 'dod pa dang / sems can rnams la snying rje rang bzhin gyis 'char ro/ /de ni 
508.5(1): dbyings kyi ra bar rig pa chud ces bya ste/ snying po bcud du 'dril ba'i rtags yin 
508.6(1): pas/ 'di man chad kyi rtags ma rdzogs par/ nyams len la bar chad kyang 'khrul 
508.7(1): pa mi 'byung / phyi'i rtags rnams thon nas sangs rgyas pa la the tshom med do/ /de 
508.8(1): nas yang dbang po'i khyad par gyis/ zla ba bdun dang dgu dang bcu gcig na/
508.9(1): rang gi mdun nam tho phyi rnams su/ thig le me long gi rnam pa lta bu 'char zhing /
508.10(1): 'od zer ni rtsibs dkyus su 'char ba yin no/ /de dag ni rig pa zin pa'i rtags 
508.11(1): yin/ de'i tshe phyi'i lus la'ang rtags 'di lta bu 'byung ba yin no/ /lus yang zhing 
508.12(1): lus la srog chags mi 'byung ba dang / las dge sdig gi rnam pa gang la yang 'jug 
508.13(1): snying mi 'dod pa dang / lus rang bzhin gyis gzhon shas che zhing snum bag dang ldan 
508.14(1): par 'ong / de ni thig le nyag cig smin pa ste/ 'od dang 'od khyim smin pa'i tshad yin 
508.15(1): no/ /de nas zla ba gsum dang lnga dang dgu na/ thig le de dag dbang po tha ma 'khar 
508.16(1): phor tsam/ 'bring la mkhar gzhong tsam/ rab la bse phub tsam du snang ngo / /de'i tshe 
508.17(1): phyi rtags ni/ lus la gnyer ma med cing zas skom kyang yid du mi 'ong pa dang /
508.18(1): rang gi snang ba de la 'bral mi phod pa dang / bar snang la 'gro ba snyam byed cing mi 
508.19(1): dang 'phrad mi 'dod pa dang / 'khrul pa'i gtam mi 'ong zhing / rtag tu lkugs pa 
508.20(1): ltar 'gro'o/ /de ni rig pa rlung dang 'bral du nye ba zhes bya ba ste/ thig le tshad du 
508.21(1): phyin pa yin pas/ 'di las cher 'gro ba'i nges pa med do/ /de nas yang zla ba 
509.1(1): gsum lnga bdun na/ thig le de dag che chung gong ma tsam las/ mang ba yul khams 
509.2(1): tsam du gang bar 'char te/ de re re la 'od lnga'i mu khyud zlum por snang ba yin no/ /
509.3(1): de'i phyi rtags kyang rang rgod bro ba dang / sngar mi shes pa'i bon mang po rgyud la 
509.4(1): 'char ba dang / ci smras thams cad bon du 'byung ba dang / rang gi bla ma la mchog 
509.5(1): tu gdung ba skye ba dang / dgra gnyen gyi 'khrul pa 'byung mi srid do/ /de ni snod nyid 
509.6(1): bcud du smin pa zhes bya'o/ / de nas zla ba gcig gsum lnga na/ thig le de dag re 
509.7(1): re'i nang du yang / sems dpa'i sku rkyang pa re re snang ba yin no/ /de'i dus su phyi'i 
509.8(1): snang ba rnams rang 'gags pa'i rtags su/ 'byung ba lnga'i gnod pa dang bral ba 
509.9(1): las sogs te/ rtags dgu 'ong ba yin no/ /de nyid kyi dus na rig pa yang 'gul 
509.10(1): ba med pa yin no/ /de ni bcud nyid snying por 'dril ba zhes bya ste/ rig pa nyid 
509.11(1): dbyings kyis gzer thebs pas na/ lam smin pa'i tshad do/ /sku gsum lam du byas 
509.12(1): pa yin no/ /de nas zla ba gsum lnga dgu na/ thig le re re'i nang du sku lnga lnga snang ba 
509.13(1): yin no/ /de'i dus na snang ba 'gul mi srid do/ /'di yi dus su 'byung ba phung po'i 
509.14(1): snang ba rang 'gags te/ gdos bcas su snang ba yang med de/ skabs su rang gi 
509.15(1): lag pa'i sor mo rnams 'od du snang ba yin no/ /'di dag rnams rdzogs na/ skye 
509.16(1): med kyi klong du mya ngan las 'das pa yin te/ 'di las gzhan du rtags zad pa 
509.17(1): yin no/ /de ni sku gsum gyi zhen pa rang chod pa zhes bya ste/ sku gsum lam du rdzogs 
509.18(1): pa'i tshad yin no/ /de ltar skyes bu gcig la rtags de rnams rdzogs na/ sangs rgyas 
509.19(1): pa la the tshom med do/ /'byung ba rnams ni 'di nyid la dag nas/ phung po lhag ma 
509.20(1): med par sangs rgyas pa yin no/ /'di'i dus su skye ba la rang dbang thob pa dang /
509.21(1): 'jug pa la rang dbang thob par 'dod na/ rang gi lag pa'i sor mo la gtad cing 
510.1(1): ltas pas/ snang ba de kun rang las dag ste/ sems can gyi don byed pa'i sems
510.2(1): can sum stong la rang gi rig pa bcug pas/ de kun kyang 'byung ba dag nas/ 'di 
510.3(1): nyid la sangs rgyas pa la the tshom med do/ /de'i dus na rig pa nyid bem po rnams la 
510.4(1): bcug kyang / de nyid 'gul ba dang / des skad 'byin nus pa 'byung ngo / /de nyid 
510.5(1): grol ba yang sems nyid dang rig pa nyid gcig pa'i phyir ro/ /'dis 'pho ba'i dus 
510.6(1): su rig pa nyid bcug na/ tshams med pa lnga'i las byas pa yang / rang dang 
510.7(1): mnyam par 'gyur ro/ /de ni las la bzang ngan med pa'i gnad kyis so/ /'di ni 
510.8(1): rang bzhin rnam par dag pa'i rtags yin pas 'gyur ba med do/ /skyes bu mchog tu 
510.9(1): gyur pa rnams ni/rtags 'di thams cad ma rdzogs par bon nyid du grol ba yang 
510.10(1): yod do/ /'dir zla ba'i bye brag tu 'byed na/ lo bdun dang zla ba bcu gcig po 
510.11(1): 'di dag ni/ tha ma'i gang zag rnams kyang / 'di las mi grol mi srid do/ /dbang 
510.12(1): po 'bring rnams ni/ lo bzhi dang zla ba lnga dang zhag drug /'byung ba rnams rang sar 
510.13(1): yal nas/ grol ba the tshom med do/ /dbang po rab lo gsum dang zla ba gcig nas 
510.14(1): grol ba yin no/ /des ma grol na/ kun ldab nas sgom na grol bar 'gyur ro/ /de'i 
510.15(1): phyir na lus kyi 'dug stangs ma gzir na/ sku gsum gyi zhen pa lam du mi chod pas/
510.16(1): bon nyid zad pa ngo mi shes/ de nas rtag tu ngag ma bcad na/ brjod pa med pa'i 
510.17(1): don mi mthong pas/ thig le nyag gcig mngon du mi 'char ro/ /mig gi lta stangs 
510.18(1): kyis rig pa ma bcun na/ rig pa nyid mngon sum du mi snang bas/ sems dang ye 
510.19(1): shes mi phyed do/ /de'i phyir na 'byung ba dwangs snyigs phyed pa'i tshad/ phyi'i 'byung ba 
510.20(1): 'gags te/ 'od du snang ba'i dus na yin no/ /bon can dang bon nyid phyed pa'i 
510.21(1): tshad/ dbyings smin mtshams dang bral ba'i dus na yin no/ /sems dang ye shes 
511.1(1): phyed pa'i tshad/ rig pa la nyin mtshan med pa'i dus na yin no/ /kun gzhi dang bon 
511.2(1): sku phyed pa'i tshad/ rang gi gdos bcas mi snang ba'i dus na yin no/ /yid dang shes 
511.3(1): rab phyed pa'i tshad/ snang ba sna tshogs su shar ba'i dus na yin no/ /de yang 'di 
511.4(1): nyid la sku gsum lam du byed pa ni/ lus ngag gi gnad bstan nas gzir ba ni/
511.5(1): sprul sku'i sgro 'dogs lam du chod pa'o/ /de nas thig le stong pa'i sgron ma shar nas/
511.6(1): thig le sku lnga lngar shar ba phan chod ni/ longs sku'i sgro 'dogs lam du chod pa'o/ /
511.7(1): rang gi lus mi snang bar 'od kyi sor mor snang ba'i dus na/ bon sku'i sgro 'dogs 
511.8(1): lam du chod pa'o/ /de yang bon nyid tshad ni mnyam par gnas na yin/ shes rab 
511.9(1): tshad ni nyams su myong na yin/ ye shes tshad ni rang gsal kha dog lnga/ dbyings kyi 
511.10(1): tshad ni gong ltar snang na yin/ rig pa'i tshad ni 'phel 'grib med na yin/ 'od kyi 
511.11(1): tshad ni phyi nang med na yin/ thig le'i tshad ni sku lnga rang gsal yin/ gzhi'i tshad ni 
511.12(1): 'phel 'grib dang bral na yin// lam gyi tshad ni gdos bcas nub na yin/ 'bras 
511.13(1): bu'i tshad ni zad sar skyol na yin/ sku'i tshad ni rang rkya'i sems dpa' yin/ 'di 
511.14(1): dag rnams ni snying po nges pa'i tshad/ phyi nang tshad ni 'di yin/ rigs kyi bu/ 'od 
511.15(1): kyi tshad ni 'od du snang na yin/ thig le'i tshad ni gdung ni yang dag yin/ rlung gi 
511.16(1): tshad ni phyi nang de bzhin sgra/ dbyings kyi tshad ni sa rnams g.yo ba yin/ sku'i tshad ni 
511.17(1): phyi nang de bzhin sku/ 'di dag rnams kyang rig pa'i yon tan yin/ tshad la ma 
511.18(1): phebs don nyid shes pa med/ tshad dang ldan pas nyams len chud mi za/ des na 
511.19(1): rtags tshad 'di nyid rab tu gces/ zhes sprul pa'i skus gsungs pa rdzogs so/ /sa

512.5(1): rtags so/ /

512.7(1): 'phrul che ba dang / lus la sha mtshan ngan pa 'byung / yang dag don la gshe ba dang /

512.9(1): ma yin/ ngo sprod ma bstan pa'i mi la yang / dang po nas sku dang zhing khams mthong 
512.10(1): ba dang / mngon shes phra mo byed pa dang / nag po kha 'byams su zlo ba dang / thams 
512.11(1): cad stong pa dge med sdig med zer/ log pa'i phyogs su shes par bya/ de dag 
512.12(1): rdzogs chen snod ma yin/ sa ma ya/
512.13(1): 7 gnyis pa yang dag rtags ni 'di yin te/ dad mos gus pa che ba dang /
512.14(1): 'khor ba la zhen chags chung ba dang / ser sna chung zhing gtong phod che/ rdzogs chen 
512.15(1): mthong na g.yo rgyu bskyur/ de ni rdzogs chen snod du bshad/ ngo sprod bstan pa'i mi 
512.16(1): la yang / ci ltar bstan pa bzhin du rim gyis 'char/ lus kyang yang zhing shes pa 
512.17(1): gsal/ so dang sen mo rje ba dang / skra dkar gnyer ma med pa dang / sbrul ltar 
513.1(1): shun pa rje ba dang / lus la srog chags med pa dang / phyogs kyi rigs rtags 
513.2(1): brdol ba dang / de rnams lus kyi grub rtags so/ /de nas ngag gi grub rtags 
513.3(1): bstan pa ni/ ci smras gzhan la phan pa dang / 'khrul pa'i tshig ni spong ba dang /
513.4(1): lkugs pa ltar du gyur pa dang / ma bslab gdams ngag shes pa dang / gtam rgyud 
513.5(1): sna tshogs shes pa dang / sgra bsgyur sna tshogs shes pa dang / grub mtha'i mtshan nyid 
513.6(1): shes pa dang / rigs drug skad rnams shes pa dang / de rnams ngag gi grub rtags 
513.7(1): so/ /yid kyi grub rtags bstan pa ni/ snying rje chen po skye ba dang / dad pa rgyun chad 
513.8(1): med pa dang / snang ba sgyu mar rtogs pa dang / 'khrul pa sems su rtogs pa dang /
513.9(1): spros pa med par gnas pa dang / 'jig rten khams rnams mthong ba dang / rang 
513.10(1): lus phyi nang mthong ba dang / mun khung nam langs rdzas rnams mthong ba dang / gar 
513.11(1): bltas 'od du mthong ba dang / sangs rgyas zhing khams 'char ba dang / bla ma mkha' 
513.12(1): 'gros lung bstan byed pa dang / thig le'i nang du sku mthong ba dang / rang gzhan 
513.13(1): bsam pa shes pa dang / mkhyen pa thogs rdugs med pa ni yid kyi grub rtags yin 
513.14(1): par bshad/

513.16(1): res mi snang bar 'gyur/ rang snang yin par thag bcad de/ 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal

514.1(1): ba sems su rtogs pa'i tshad/ sems la nges shes skye ba 'byung / de dus lus sems 
514.2(1): bral gyur kyang / bar do shar dus ngo shes nas/ skye ba de rjes 'gro don la/ sprul sku'i 
514.3(1): zhing khams su skye bar 'gyur/ de nas snang ba mched pa'i dus/ dbyings kyi rtags 
514.4(1): rnams rdzogs pa'i rtags/ snang ba dang rang sems gnyis su med pa'i tshad/ de dus 
514.5(1): lus sems bral gyur kyang / pha rol srid pa'i bar do ru/ zhag gsum bar du gnyid

544.10(1): ldan rang rgyud smin par byed/ de la bzhi/ spros bcas kyi dbang dang / spros med 
544.11(1): kyi dbang dang / shin tu spros pa med pa dang / rab tu spros pa med pa'i dbang 
544.12(1): ste bzhi'o/ /mthun pa'i dpe ni/ rgyal bu yin pa la/ rgyal por mnga' gsol bas 
544.13(1): rgyal srid skyong zhing dbang thang la dbang bskur ba'i dpe lta bu'o/ /dpe de bzhin 
544.14(1): du rang la rig pa'i rtsal ye nas yod pa la/ dbang bskur bas mnga' brnyes pa

544.17(1): byed rtags kyi dbang bskur ba dang / gsang ba sems kyi dkyil 'khor du mtshan 
544.18(1): gzhi bon nyid kyi dbang bskur ba dang / de kho na nyid yang gsang thugs kyi dkyil 
544.19(1): 'khor du rig pa'i rtsal gyi dbang bskur ba dang bzhi ston no/ /spros pa med pa'i 
544.20(1): dbang mchog ni/ dkyil 'khor bum pa la brten nas/ tshigs su spyod pa'i dbang 
544.21(1): sbyin bya/ dbang gi brda la rten pa yi/ rang rig gsal ba'i rang ngo sprod/ brda 
545.1(1): 'grol man ngag mkhas par bya'o/ /dbang ma bskur ba'i skyon ni/ rang gi rig pa'i 
545.2(1): rtsal dbang ma bskur na/ slob bu la rdul tshon gyi dkyil 'khor mang po bstan nas/

545.10(1): bzhin bskyed rim yin/ yid la 'gyus pa'i mchod pa yin/ gzugs su snang ba lha 
545.11(1): yi sku/ sgra chen brjod pas rol mo nyid/ rang gi lus ni lum pa la/ skra yi lo 'dab 
545.12(1): ljon pa mdzes/ khrag dang chu ser chu rnams nyid/ don snying la sogs rdzas kyis 
545.13(1): bltams/ rang la snang ba'i dbang rnams sbyin/ ma bskur nyid la rdzogs pa'o/ /zhes

545.19(1): sprod ni la bzla'i don du gsal lo/ /athaM/

545.21(1): pa/ shad pa rtags kyi bum pa ste/ rang lus bum par shes pa ni/ de ni dbang bskur 
546.1(1): dang po yin/ dbyings rig gnyis la 'byor pa ni/ de ni dbang bskur gnyis pa 
546.2(1): yin/ thabs shes gnyis su med pa ni/ de ni dbang bskur gsum pa yin/ tshig

546.5(1): dbang bskur g.yung drung sku/ 'khor 'das lam gsum rig pa mngon sum du/ rtsal

546.14(1): gling ngo bo bde dgon phyi yi gnas/ phung po sku yi sgrub khang nang gi gnas/ rang gi

546.21(1): dpon rang la (slob dpon rang byung )rdzogs pas ston pa mtha' dang bral/ gdams
